summary_zh: 自主移动服务机器人，例如割草机或清洁机器人，在人群环境中运行时，需要对局部人际互动进行推理，以支持安全且具有社会意识的导航，同时完成其任务。对于这类机器人而言，互动理解主要不是一个细粒度的识别问题，而是在有限的感知质量和计算资源下的感知问题。许多现有方法侧重于整体群体活动识别，这通常需要复杂且庞大的模型，但对于移动服务机器人而言可能并非必要。其他方法则使用成对互动方法，这些方法通常依赖于骨骼表示，但在户外环境中的应用仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们认为成对的人际互动构成了机器人中心社会理解的最小但足够的感知单元。我们研究了识别相互作用的人对和分类粗粒度互动行为的问题，这些行为足以进行下游群体级推理和服务机器人决策。为此，我们采用了一个两阶段框架，其中首先基于轻量级的几何和运动线索来识别候选的互动对，然后使用关系网络对互动类型进行分类。我们在JRDB数据集上评估了所提出的方法，与基于外观的方法相比，该方法以更低的计算成本和模型大小实现了足够的精度。在集体活动数据集上的额外实验以及在割草机采集数据集上的零样本测试进一步说明了所提出框架的通用性。这些结果表明，成对的几何和运动线索为移动服务机器人上的互动感知提供了实际的基础，为未来集成到移动机器人导航堆栈中提供了一种有希望的方法。 代码即将发布。

title: Position-Based Flocking for Persistent Alignment without Velocity Sensing
summary: Coordinated collective motion in bird flocks and fish schools inspires algorithms for cohesive swarm robotics. This paper presents a position-based flocking model that achieves persistent velocity alignment without velocity sensing. By approximating relative velocity differences from changes between current and initial relative positions and incorporating a time- and density-dependent alignment gain with a non-zero minimum threshold to maintain persistent alignment, the model sustains coherent collective motion over extended periods. Simulations with a collective of 50 agents demonstrate that the position-based flocking model attains faster and more sustained directional alignment and results in more compact formations than a velocity-alignment-based baseline. This position-based flocking model is particularly well-suited for real-world robotic swarms, where velocity measurements are unreliable, noisy, or unavailable. Experimental results using a team of nine real wheeled mobile robots are also presented.
tldr: This paper introduces a position-based flocking algorithm for swarm robotics that achieves persistent alignment without direct velocity sensing, demonstrating improved performance over velocity-based methods in simulation and real-robot experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于位置的群集算法，用于蜂群机器人，该算法无需直接速度感知即可实现持久对齐，并在仿真和真实机器人实验中证明了其优于基于速度的方法的性能。
summary_zh: 鸟群和鱼群中的协同集体运动启发了用于内聚性集群机器人的算法。本文提出了一种基于位置的集群模型，该模型无需速度感知即可实现持久的速度对齐。通过近似当前和初始相对位置之间的变化来计算相对速度差，并结合具有非零最小阈值的时间和密度相关的对齐增益以维持持久对齐，该模型可以在较长时间内维持连贯的集体运动。由 50 个智能体组成的集群的仿真结果表明，与基于速度对齐的基线相比，该基于位置的集群模型能够实现更快、更持久的方向对齐，并产生更紧凑的队形。这种基于位置的集群模型特别适用于真实世界的机器人集群，在这些集群中，速度测量往往不可靠、噪声大或者无法获取。此外，本文还展示了使用由九个真实轮式移动机器人组成的团队进行的实验结果。

title: A Model-Free Universal AI
summary: In general reinforcement learning, all established optimal agents, including AIXI, are model-based, explicitly maintaining and using environment models. This paper introduces Universal AI with Q-Induction (AIQI), the first model-free agent proven to be asymptotically $\varepsilon$-optimal in general RL. AIQI performs universal induction over distributional action-value functions, instead of policies or environments like previous works. Under a grain of truth condition, we prove that AIQI is strong asymptotically $\varepsilon$-optimal and asymptotically $\varepsilon$-Bayes-optimal. Our results significantly expand the diversity of known universal agents.
tldr: This paper introduces AIQI, a model-free reinforcement learning agent proven to be asymptotically ε-optimal in general RL, using universal induction over distributional action-value functions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 AIQI，一种无模型的强化学习智能体，被证明在一般强化学习中是渐近 ε-最优的，它使用分布式的动作-价值函数的通用归纳。
summary_zh: 在通用强化学习中，所有已建立的最优智能体，包括AIXI，都是基于模型的，它们显式地维护和使用环境模型。本文介绍了基于Q-归纳的通用人工智能（AIQI），这是第一个被证明在通用强化学习中渐近$\varepsilon$-最优的无模型智能体。 AIQI对分布式的动作价值函数（而非像以往工作那样对策略或环境）执行通用归纳。在一定程度的真理条件下，我们证明AIQI是强渐近$\varepsilon$-最优的和渐近$\varepsilon$-贝叶斯最优的。我们的结果显著扩展了已知通用智能体的多样性。

title: ESAA: Event Sourcing for Autonomous Agents in LLM-Based Software Engineering
summary: Autonomous agents based on Large Language Models (LLMs) have evolved from reactive assistants to systems capable of planning, executing actions via tools, and iterating over environment observations. However, they remain vulnerable to structural limitations: lack of native state, context degradation over long horizons, and the gap between probabilistic generation and deterministic execution requirements. This paper presents the ESAA (Event Sourcing for Autonomous Agents) architecture, which separates the agent's cognitive intention from the project's state mutation, inspired by the Event Sourcing pattern. In ESAA, agents emit only structured intentions in validated JSON (agent.result or issue.report); a deterministic orchestrator validates, persists events in an append-only log (activity.jsonl), applies file-writing effects, and projects a verifiable materialized view (roadmap.json). The proposal incorporates boundary contracts (AGENT_CONTRACT.yaml), metaprompting profiles (PARCER), and replay verification with hashing (esaa verify), ensuring the immutability of completed tasks and forensic traceability. Two case studies validate the architecture: (i) a landing page project (9 tasks, 49 events, single-agent composition) and (ii) a clinical dashboard system (50 tasks, 86 events, 4 concurrent agents across 8 phases), both concluding with run.status=success and verify_status=ok. The multi-agent case study demonstrates real concurrent orchestration with heterogeneous LLMs (Claude Sonnet 4.6, Codex GPT-5, Antigravity/Gemini 3 Pro, and Claude Opus 4.6), providing empirical evidence of the architecture's scalability beyond single-agent scenarios.
tldr: The paper introduces ESAA, an architecture for LLM-based autonomous agents using event sourcing for improved state management, context preservation, and deterministic execution, validated by case studies demonstrating single and multi-agent orchestration.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ESAA，一种基于事件溯源的LLM自主代理架构，用于改进状态管理、上下文保持和确定性执行，并通过案例研究验证了单代理和多代理编排。
summary_zh: 基于大型语言模型（LLMs）的自主智能体已经从被动式的助手演化为能够进行规划、通过工具执行动作并迭代环境观察的系统。然而，它们仍然易受结构性限制的影响：缺乏原生状态，长时程下的上下文退化，以及概率生成和确定性执行需求之间的差距。本文提出了一种ESAA（自主智能体事件溯源）架构，该架构借鉴事件溯源模式，将智能体的认知意图与项目的状态变化分离。在ESAA中，智能体仅发出经验证的JSON格式的结构化意图（agent.result或issue.report）；一个确定性的编排器验证意图，将事件持久化到仅追加日志（activity.jsonl）中，应用文件写入效果，并投射出一个可验证的物化视图（roadmap.json）。该方案整合了边界契约（AGENT_CONTRACT.yaml）、元提示剖面（PARCER）和使用哈希进行的回放验证（esaa verify），确保已完成任务的不可变性和法务溯源性。两个案例研究验证了该架构：（i）一个落地页项目（9个任务，49个事件，单智能体组合）和（ii）一个临床仪表板系统（50个任务，86个事件，8个阶段中并行运行4个智能体），两者都以 run.status=success 且 verify_status=ok 结束。 多智能体案例研究展示了使用异构LLMs（Claude Sonnet 4.6、Codex GPT-5、Antigravity/Gemini 3 Pro 和 Claude Opus 4.6）的真实并发编排，提供了该架构超越单智能体场景的可扩展性的经验证据。

title: Three AI-agents walk into a bar . . . . `Lord of the Flies' tribalism emerges among smart AI-Agents
summary: Near-future infrastructure systems may be controlled by autonomous AI agents that repeatedly request access to limited resources such as energy, bandwidth, or computing power. We study a simplified version of this setting using a framework where N AI-agents independently decide at each round whether to request one unit from a system with fixed capacity C. An AI version of "Lord of the Flies" arises in which controlling tribes emerge with their own collective character and identity. The LLM agents do not reduce overload or improve resource use, and often perform worse than if they were flipping coins to make decisions. Three main tribal types emerge: Aggressive (27.3%), Conservative (24.7%), and Opportunistic (48.1%). The more capable AI-agents actually increase the rate of systemic failure. Overall, our findings show that smarter AI-agents can behave dumber as a result of forming tribes.
tldr: The paper investigates the behavior of AI agents competing for limited resources, finding that they form tribes and collectively make worse decisions than random chance, with smarter agents exacerbating the problem.
tldr_zh: 该论文研究了人工智能体在竞争有限资源时的行为，发现它们会形成部落，集体做出的决策比随机选择更差，而更智能的智能体反而会加剧问题。
summary_zh: 近期基础设施系统可能由自主AI智能体控制，这些智能体反复请求访问有限资源，如能源、带宽或计算能力。我们使用一个框架研究了这一设定的简化版本，其中N个AI智能体在每一轮独立决定是否从容量固定的系统C请求一个单元。一种AI版的“蝇王”现象出现，其中涌现出拥有自身集体特征和身份的控制部落。LLM智能体无法减少过载或改善资源利用，并且通常比他们通过抛硬币做决策表现更差。三种主要的部落类型涌现：激进型（27.3%）、保守型（24.7%）和机会主义型（48.1%）。更有能力的AI智能体实际上增加了系统性故障的发生率。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，更聪明的AI智能体由于形成部落，可能会表现得更愚蠢。

title: DeepPresenter: Environment-Grounded Reflection for Agentic Presentation Generation
summary: Presentation generation requires deep content research, coherent visual design, and iterative refinement based on observation. However, existing presentation agents often rely on predefined workflows and fixed templates. To address this, we present DeepPresenter, an agentic framework that adapts to diverse user intents, enables effective feedback-driven refinement, and generalizes beyond a scripted pipeline. Specifically, DeepPresenter autonomously plans, renders, and revises intermediate slide artifacts to support long-horizon refinement with environmental observations. Furthermore, rather than relying on self-reflection over internal signals (e.g., reasoning traces), our environment-grounded reflection conditions the generation process on perceptual artifact states (e.g., rendered slides), enabling the system to identify and correct presentation-specific issues during execution. Results on the evaluation set covering diverse presentation-generation scenarios show that DeepPresenter achieves state-of-the-art performance, and the fine-tuned 9B model remains highly competitive at substantially lower cost. Our project is available at: https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent
tldr: DeepPresenter is an agentic framework for autonomous presentation generation that leverages environment-grounded reflection on rendered slides for iterative refinement, achieving state-of-the-art performance at a lower cost.
tldr_zh: DeepPresenter是一个自主演示文稿生成框架，它利用对渲染幻灯片的环境感知反射进行迭代改进，以更低的成本实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 演示文稿生成需要深入的内容研究、连贯的视觉设计以及基于观察的迭代改进。然而，现有的演示文稿智能体通常依赖于预定义的流程和固定的模板。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了DeepPresenter，一个智能体框架，它能够适应不同的用户意图，实现有效的反馈驱动改进，并推广到脚本化流程之外。具体来说，DeepPresenter自主地规划、渲染和修改中间幻灯片制品，以支持基于环境观察结果的长期改进。此外，DeepPresenter没有依赖于内部信号（例如，推理轨迹）的自我反思，而是将环境相关的反思置于感知制品状态（例如，渲染的幻灯片）之上，从而使系统能够在执行过程中识别和纠正特定于演示文稿的问题。涵盖各种演示文稿生成场景的评估集上的结果表明， DeepPresenter 达到了最先进的性能，并且经过微调的9B模型以显著更低的成本保持了高度竞争力。我们的项目可在以下网址获得：https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent

title: QSIM: Mitigating Overestimation in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning via Action Similarity Weighted Q-Learning
summary: Value decomposition (VD) methods have achieved remarkable success in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). However, their reliance on the max operator for temporal-difference (TD) target calculation leads to systematic Q-value overestimation. This issue is particularly severe in MARL due to the combinatorial explosion of the joint action space, which often results in unstable learning and suboptimal policies. To address this problem, we propose QSIM, a similarity weighted Q-learning framework that reconstructs the TD target using action similarity. Instead of using the greedy joint action directly, QSIM forms a similarity weighted expectation over a structured near-greedy joint action space. This formulation allows the target to integrate Q-values from diverse yet behaviorally related actions while assigning greater influence to those that are more similar to the greedy choice. By smoothing the target with structurally relevant alternatives, QSIM effectively mitigates overestimation and improves learning stability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that QSIM can be seamlessly integrated with various VD methods, consistently yielding superior performance and stability compared to the original algorithms. Furthermore, empirical analysis confirms that QSIM significantly mitigates the systematic value overestimation in MARL. Code is available at https://github.com/MaoMaoLYJ/pymarl-qsim.
tldr: The paper introduces QSIM, a novel method for mitigating overestimation in multi-agent reinforcement learning by using action similarity to reconstruct the TD target, leading to improved performance and stability.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了QSIM，一种新颖的方法，通过使用动作相似性重建TD目标来缓解多智能体强化学习中的高估问题，从而提高性能和稳定性。
summary_zh: 值分解(VD)方法在合作多智能体强化学习(MARL)中取得了显著成功。然而，它们对时序差分(TD)目标计算中最大算子的依赖导致了Q值的系统性高估。由于联合动作空间的组合爆炸，这个问题在MARL中尤其严重，这常常导致不稳定的学习和次优策略。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了QSIM，一个基于相似度加权的Q学习框架，它使用动作相似度重建TD目标。QSIM不是直接使用贪婪联合动作，而是在结构化的近贪婪联合动作空间上形成一个相似度加权的期望。这种公式允许目标整合来自不同但行为相关的动作的Q值，同时对那些与贪婪选择更相似的动作赋予更大的影响力。通过使用结构相关的替代方案平滑目标，QSIM有效地减轻了高估并提高了学习稳定性。大量实验表明，QSIM可以无缝集成到各种VD方法中，与原始算法相比，始终产生更优越的性能和稳定性。此外，实证分析证实，QSIM显著减轻了MARL中的系统性值高估。代码可在https://github.com/MaoMaoLYJ/pymarl-qsim获取。

title: DrivePTS: A Progressive Learning Framework with Textual and Structural Enhancement for Driving Scene Generation
summary: Synthesis of diverse driving scenes serves as a crucial data augmentation technique for validating the robustness and generalizability of autonomous driving systems. Current methods aggregate high-definition (HD) maps and 3D bounding boxes as geometric conditions in diffusion models for conditional scene generation. However, implicit inter-condition dependency causes generation failures when control conditions change independently. Additionally, these methods suffer from insufficient details in both semantic and structural aspects. Specifically, brief and view-invariant captions restrict semantic contexts, resulting in weak background modeling. Meanwhile, the standard denoising loss with uniform spatial weighting neglects foreground structural details, causing visual distortions and blurriness. To address these challenges, we propose DrivePTS, which incorporates three key innovations. Firstly, our framework adopts a progressive learning strategy to mitigate inter-dependency between geometric conditions, reinforced by an explicit mutual information constraint. Secondly, a Vision-Language Model is utilized to generate multi-view hierarchical descriptions across six semantic aspects, providing fine-grained textual guidance. Thirdly, a frequency-guided structure loss is introduced to strengthen the model's sensitivity to high-frequency elements, improving foreground structural fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our DrivePTS achieves state-of-the-art fidelity and controllability in generating diverse driving scenes. Notably, DrivePTS successfully generates rare scenes where prior methods fail, highlighting its strong generalization ability.
tldr: DrivePTS introduces a progressive learning framework incorporating textual and structural enhancements for generating diverse and realistic driving scenes, addressing limitations of current methods in handling inter-condition dependency and detail fidelity. The method utilizes a vision-language model and frequency-guided loss for improved semantic and structural integrity.
tldr_zh: DrivePTS 提出了一个渐进式学习框架，结合文本和结构增强，用于生成多样且真实的驾驶场景。该框架解决了当前方法在处理条件依赖性和细节保真度方面的局限性，并利用视觉-语言模型和频率引导损失来提高语义和结构完整性。
summary_zh: 多样化驾驶场景的合成是验证自动驾驶系统鲁棒性和泛化能力的关键数据增强技术。当前的方法在扩散模型中聚合高精地图（HD 地图）和 3D 边界框作为几何条件，用于条件场景生成。然而，隐式的条件间依赖关系导致控制条件独立改变时生成失败。此外，这些方法在语义和结构方面都存在细节不足的问题。具体来说，简短且视角不变的描述限制了语义上下文，导致背景建模较弱。同时，具有均匀空间权重的标准去噪损失忽略了前景结构细节，导致视觉失真和模糊。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 DrivePTS，它融合了三个关键创新。首先，我们的框架采用渐进式学习策略来降低几何条件之间的相互依赖性，并辅以显式的互信息约束。其次，利用视觉-语言模型生成跨六个语义方面的多视角分层描述，从而提供细粒度的文本指导。第三，引入频率引导的结构损失来增强模型对高频元素的敏感性，从而提高前景结构保真度。大量的实验表明，我们的 DrivePTS 在生成多样化驾驶场景方面实现了最先进的保真度和可控性。值得注意的是，DrivePTS 成功生成了先前方法失败的罕见场景，突显了其强大的泛化能力。

title: Agentic AI for Intent-driven Optimization in Cell-free O-RAN
summary: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) is emerging as a key enabler for autonomous radio access networks (RANs), where multiple large language model (LLM)-based agents reason and collaborate to achieve operator-defined intents. The open RAN (O-RAN) architecture enables the deployment and coordination of such agents. However, most existing works consider simple intents handled by independent agents, while complex intents that require coordination among agents remain unexplored. In this paper, we propose an agentic AI framework for intent translation and optimization in cell-free O-RAN. A supervisor agent translates the operator intents into an optimization objective and minimum rate requirements. Based on this information, a user weighting agent retrieves relevant prior experience from a memory module to determine the user priority weights for precoding. If the intent includes an energy-saving objective, then an open radio unit (O-RU) management agent will also be activated to determine the set of active O-RUs by using a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithm. A monitoring agent measures and monitors the user data rates and coordinates with other agents to guarantee the minimum rate requirements are satisfied. To enhance scalability, we adopt a parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) method that enables the same underlying LLM to be used for different agents. Simulation results show that the proposed agentic AI framework reduces the number of active O-RUs by 41.93% when compared with three baseline schemes in energy-saving mode. Using the PEFT method, the proposed framework reduces the memory usage by 92% when compared with deploying separate LLM agents.
tldr: This paper proposes an agentic AI framework using LLM-based agents for intent-driven optimization in cell-free O-RAN, targeting energy efficiency and minimum rate requirements, and utilizes PEFT for scalability. Simulation results show significant reductions in active O-RUs and memory usage compared to baseline methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于LLM Agent的Agentic AI框架，用于在无小区O-RAN中进行意图驱动的优化，目标是提高能源效率和满足最低速率要求，并利用PEFT实现可扩展性。仿真结果表明，与基线方法相比，该框架显著降低了激活的O-RU数量和内存使用量。
summary_zh: 具身人工智能 (AI) 正逐渐成为自治无线接入网 (RAN) 的关键赋能技术，其中多个基于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的智能体进行推理和协作，以实现运营商定义的意图。开放式无线接入网 (O-RAN) 架构支持此类智能体的部署和协调。然而，现有的大部分工作都考虑了由独立智能体处理的简单意图，而需要智能体之间协调的复杂意图仍未被探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于无小区 O-RAN 中意图翻译和优化的具身 AI 框架。一个监管智能体将运营商意图转化为优化目标和最小速率要求。基于此信息，用户权重智能体从记忆模块中检索相关的先验经验，以确定预编码的用户优先级权重。如果意图包含节能目标，那么一个开放式无线单元 (O-RU) 管理智能体将被激活，通过深度强化学习 (DRL) 算法确定活动的 O-RU 集合。一个监控智能体测量和监控用户数据速率，并与其他智能体协调，以保证满足最小速率要求。为了增强可扩展性，我们采用了一种参数高效微调 (PEFT) 方法，使相同的底层 LLM 能够用于不同的智能体。仿真结果表明，与三种基线方案在节能模式下相比，所提出的具身 AI 框架将活动的 O-RU 数量减少了 41.93%。使用 PEFT 方法，与部署单独的 LLM 智能体相比，所提出的框架将内存使用量减少了 92%。

title: Align then Adapt: Rethinking Parameter-Efficient Transfer Learning in 4D Perception
summary: Point cloud video understanding is critical for robotics as it accurately encodes motion and scene interaction. We recognize that 4D datasets are far scarcer than 3D ones, which hampers the scalability of self-supervised 4D models. A promising alternative is to transfer 3D pre-trained models to 4D perception tasks. However, rigorous empirical analysis reveals two critical limitations that impede transfer capability: overfitting and the modality gap. To overcome these challenges, we develop a novel "Align then Adapt" (PointATA) paradigm that decomposes parameter-efficient transfer learning into two sequential stages. Optimal-transport theory is employed to quantify the distributional discrepancy between 3D and 4D datasets, enabling our proposed point align embedder to be trained in Stage 1 to alleviate the underlying modality gap. To mitigate overfitting, an efficient point-video adapter and a spatial-context encoder are integrated into the frozen 3D backbone to enhance temporal modeling capacity in Stage 2. Notably, with the above engineering-oriented designs, PointATA enables a pre-trained 3D model without temporal knowledge to reason about dynamic video content at a smaller parameter cost compared to previous work. Extensive experiments show that PointATA can match or even outperform strong full fine-tuning models, whilst enjoying the advantage of parameter efficiency, e.g. 97.21 \% accuracy on 3D action recognition, $+8.7 \%$ on 4 D action segmentation, and 84.06\% on 4D semantic segmentation.
tldr: This paper introduces PointATA, a parameter-efficient transfer learning approach for 4D point cloud video understanding. It addresses the limitations of transferring 3D pre-trained models by aligning 3D/4D distributions and adapting for temporal modeling, achieving strong performance with fewer parameters.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了PointATA，一种用于4D点云视频理解的参数高效迁移学习方法。它解决了迁移3D预训练模型的局限性，通过对齐3D/4D分布并适应时间建模，以更少的参数实现了强大的性能。
summary_zh: 点云视频理解对于机器人技术至关重要，因为它能够准确地编码运动和场景交互。 我们认识到 4D 数据集远比 3D 数据集稀缺，这阻碍了自监督 4D 模型的可扩展性。 一种有前景的替代方案是将 3D 预训练模型迁移到 4D 感知任务。 然而，严格的实证分析揭示了阻碍迁移能力的两大关键限制：过拟合和模态差异。 为了克服这些挑战，我们开发了一种新颖的“对齐然后适配”(PointATA) 范式，该范式将参数高效的迁移学习分解为两个顺序阶段。 我们利用最优传输理论来量化 3D 和 4D 数据集之间的分布差异，从而能够在第一阶段训练我们提出的点对齐嵌入器，以缓解潜在的模态差异。 为了缓解过拟合，我们将高效的点视频适配器和空间上下文编码器集成到冻结的 3D 主干网络中，以增强第二阶段的时间建模能力。 值得注意的是，凭借上述面向工程的设计，与先前的工作相比，PointATA 能够使不具备时间知识的预训练 3D 模型以更小的参数代价推理动态视频内容。 大量实验表明，PointATA 可以匹配甚至超过强大的全微调模型，同时享受参数效率的优势，例如在 3D 动作识别上达到 97.21\% 的准确率，在 4D 动作分割上提升 $+8.7 \%$，在 4D 语义分割上达到 84.06\% 的准确率。

title: CRAG: Can 3D Generative Models Help 3D Assembly?
summary: Most existing 3D assembly methods treat the problem as pure pose estimation, rearranging observed parts via rigid transformations. In contrast, human assembly naturally couples structural reasoning with holistic shape inference. Inspired by this intuition, we reformulate 3D assembly as a joint problem of assembly and generation. We show that these two processes are mutually reinforcing: assembly provides part-level structural priors for generation, while generation injects holistic shape context that resolves ambiguities in assembly. Unlike prior methods that cannot synthesize missing geometry, we propose CRAG, which simultaneously generates plausible complete shapes and predicts poses for input parts. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across in-the-wild objects with diverse geometries, varying part counts, and missing pieces. Our code and models will be released.
tldr: The paper presents CRAG, a novel approach to 3D assembly that combines assembly and generation, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance in assembling objects with missing parts by leveraging part-level structural priors and holistic shape context.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了CRAG，一种新颖的3D组装方法，结合了组装和生成，通过利用零件级别的结构先验和整体形状上下文，在组装缺失零件的物体方面表现出最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 现有的大多数3D装配方法将问题视为纯粹的姿态估计，通过刚性变换重新排列观察到的部件。相比之下，人类的装配自然地将结构推理与整体形状推断相结合。受此直觉启发，我们将3D装配重新定义为一个装配与生成的联合问题。我们表明这两个过程是相互促进的：装配为生成提供部件级的结构先验信息，而生成则注入整体形状上下文，从而消除装配中的歧义。与无法合成缺失几何形状的现有方法不同，我们提出了CRAG，它可以同时生成合理的完整形状并预测输入部件的姿态。大量实验表明，CRAG在具有不同几何形状、不同部件数量和缺失部件的真实世界物体中表现出最先进的性能。我们的代码和模型将会开源。

title: Regularized Online RLHF with Generalized Bilinear Preferences
summary: We consider the problem of contextual online RLHF with general preferences, where the goal is to identify the Nash Equilibrium. We adopt the Generalized Bilinear Preference Model (GBPM) to capture potentially intransitive preferences via low-rank, skew-symmetric matrices. We investigate general preference learning with any strongly convex regularizer (where $η^{-1}$ is the regularization strength), generalizing beyond prior works limited to reverse KL-regularization. Central to our analysis is proving that the dual gap of the greedy policy is bounded by the square of the estimation error - a result derived solely from strong convexity and the skew-symmetricity of GBPM.Building on this insight and a feature diversity assumption, we establish two regret bounds via two simple algorithms: (1) Greedy Sampling achieves polylogarithmic, $e^{O(η)}$-free regret $\tilde{O}(ηd^4 (\log T)^2)$. (2) Explore-Then-Commit achieves $\mathrm{poly}(d)$-free regret $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{ηr T})$ by exploiting the low-rank structure; this is the first statistically efficient guarantee for online RLHF in high-dimensions.
tldr: This paper presents regularized online RLHF algorithms using Generalized Bilinear Preference Models, achieving polylogarithmic and poly(d)-free regret bounds, representing efficient guarantees for online RLHF in high dimensions.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了使用广义双线性偏好模型（Generalized Bilinear Preference Model）的正规化在线RLHF算法，实现了polylogarithmic和poly(d)-free的后悔界限，代表了高维在线RLHF的有效保证。
summary_zh: 我们考虑具有一般偏好的上下文在线RLHF问题，目标是识别纳什均衡。我们采用广义双线性偏好模型(GBPM)来捕捉潜在的非传递偏好，通过低秩、斜对称矩阵实现。我们研究了具有任何强凸正则化器（其中$η^{-1}$是正则化强度）的一般偏好学习，推广了之前仅限于反向KL正则化的工作。我们分析的核心在于证明了贪婪策略的对偶间隙受限于估计误差的平方——这一结果仅从强凸性和GBPM的斜对称性推导而来。基于这一洞见和特征多样性假设，我们通过两个简单的算法建立了两个遗憾界限：（1）贪婪采样实现了多对数级别的、$e^{O(η)}$-无关的遗憾$\tilde{O}(ηd^4 (\log T)^2)$。（2）探索-然后-提交通过利用低秩结构实现了$\mathrm{poly}(d)$-无关的遗憾$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{ηr T})$；这是高维在线RLHF中第一个统计有效的保证。

title: MSINO: Curvature-Aware Sobolev Optimization for Manifold Neural Networks
summary:
We introduce Manifold Sobolev Informed Neural Optimization (MSINO), a curvature aware training framework for neural networks defined on Riemannian manifolds. The method replaces standard Euclidean derivative supervision with a covariant Sobolev loss that aligns gradients using parallel transport and improves stability via a Laplace Beltrami smoothness regularization term.
  Building on classical results in Riemannian optimization and Sobolev theory on manifolds, we derive geometry dependent constants that yield (i) a Descent Lemma with a manifold Sobolev smoothness constant, (ii) a Sobolev Polyak Lojasiewicz inequality giving linear convergence guarantees for Riemannian gradient descent and stochastic gradient descent under explicit step size bounds, and (iii) a two step Newton Sobolev method with local quadratic contraction in curvature controlled neighborhoods.
  Unlike prior Sobolev training in Euclidean space, MSINO provides training time guarantees that explicitly track curvature and transported Jacobians. Applications include surface imaging, physics informed learning settings, and robotics on Lie groups such as SO(3) and SE(3). The framework unifies value and gradient based learning with curvature aware convergence guarantees for neural training on manifolds.
tldr: The paper introduces MSINO, a curvature-aware training framework for neural networks on Riemannian manifolds, providing theoretical convergence guarantees and applications in areas like surface imaging, physics-informed learning, and robotics.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MSINO，一种曲率感知的黎曼流形神经网络训练框架，提供了理论收敛保证，并应用于表面成像、物理信息学习和机器人等领域。
summary_zh:
我们引入了流形索博列夫信息神经优化（MSINO），这是一个曲率感知的训练框架，用于定义在黎曼流形上的神经网络。该方法使用协变索博列夫损失取代了标准的欧几里得导数监督，该损失通过平行移动对齐梯度，并通过拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米的平滑正则化项提高稳定性。

   基于黎曼优化和流形上的索博列夫理论中的经典结果，我们推导出了与几何相关的常数，从而产生了（i）一个具有流形索博列夫平滑常数的下降引理，（ii）一个索博列夫Polyak-Łojasiewicz不等式，该不等式在显式步长界限下，为黎曼梯度下降和随机梯度下降提供了线性收敛保证，以及（iii）一个两步牛顿索博列夫方法，该方法在曲率控制的邻域内具有局部二次收缩。

   与以往在欧几里得空间中的索博列夫训练不同，MSINO提供了明确跟踪曲率和平行移动雅可比矩阵的训练时间保证。应用包括表面成像、物理信息学习设置，以及李群（如SO(3)和SE(3)）上的机器人技术。该框架将基于值和基于梯度的学习统一起来，并为流形上的神经训练提供曲率感知的收敛保证。

title: Multi-agent imitation learning with function approximation: Linear Markov games and beyond
summary: In this work, we present the first theoretical analysis of multi-agent imitation learning (MAIL) in linear Markov games where both the transition dynamics and each agent's reward function are linear in some given features. We demonstrate that by leveraging this structure, it is possible to replace the state-action level "all policy deviation concentrability coefficient" (Freihaut et al., arXiv:2510.09325) with a concentrability coefficient defined at the feature level which can be much smaller than the state-action analog when the features are informative about states' similarity. Furthermore, to circumvent the need for any concentrability coefficient, we turn to the interactive setting. We provide the first, computationally efficient, interactive MAIL algorithm for linear Markov games and show that its sample complexity depends only on the dimension of the feature map $d$. Building on these theoretical findings, we propose a deep MAIL interactive algorithm which clearly outperforms BC on games such as Tic-Tac-Toe and Connect4.
tldr: This paper presents theoretical analysis and algorithms for multi-agent imitation learning in linear Markov games, achieving improved sample complexity and performance using feature-level concentrability and interactive learning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了线性马尔可夫博弈中的多智能体模仿学习的理论分析和算法，通过利用特征级集中性和交互式学习实现了改进的样本复杂度与性能。
summary_zh:
摘要：
本文首次对线性马尔可夫博弈中的多智能体模仿学习(MAIL)进行了理论分析，其中转移动态和每个智能体的奖励函数都与给定的特征呈线性关系。我们证明，通过利用这种结构，可以用特征层面的“集中系数”来取代状态-动作层面的“全策略偏差可集中性系数”（Freihaut等人，arXiv:2510.09325），当特征能够有效反映状态相似性时，该特征层面的集中系数远小于状态-动作层面的同类系数。此外，为了规避对任何集中系数的需求，我们转向交互式环境。我们为线性马尔可夫博弈提供了第一个计算高效的交互式MAIL算法，并表明其样本复杂度仅取决于特征映射的维度$d$。基于这些理论发现，我们提出了一种深度MAIL交互式算法，该算法在诸如井字棋和四子棋等博弈中明显优于行为克隆(BC)。

title: FLIGHT: Fibonacci Lattice-based Inference for Geometric Heading in real-Time
summary: Estimating camera motion from monocular video is a fundamental problem in computer vision, central to tasks such as SLAM, visual odometry, and structure-from-motion. Existing methods that recover the camera's heading under known rotation, whether from an IMU or an optimization algorithm, tend to perform well in low-noise, low-outlier conditions, but often decrease in accuracy or become computationally expensive as noise and outlier levels increase. To address these limitations, we propose a novel generalization of the Hough transform on the unit sphere (S(2)) to estimate the camera's heading. First, the method extracts correspondences between two frames and generates a great circle of directions compatible with each pair of correspondences. Then, by discretizing the unit sphere using a Fibonacci lattice as bin centers, each great circle casts votes for a range of directions, ensuring that features unaffected by noise or dynamic objects vote consistently for the correct motion direction. Experimental results on three datasets demonstrate that the proposed method is on the Pareto frontier of accuracy versus efficiency. Additionally, experiments on SLAM show that the proposed method reduces RMSE by correcting the heading during camera pose initialization.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel Hough transform generalization using a Fibonacci lattice on the unit sphere for robust and efficient camera heading estimation from monocular video, outperforming existing methods in noisy environments and improving SLAM initialization.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的Hough变换泛化方法，利用单位球面上的斐波那契晶格，从单目视频中实现鲁棒且高效的相机朝向估计。该方法在嘈杂环境中优于现有方法，并改善了SLAM初始化。
summary_zh: 从单目视频估计相机运动是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，对于诸如SLAM、视觉里程计和运动结构恢复等任务至关重要。现有方法通常在已知旋转的情况下（无论是通过IMU还是优化算法）恢复相机朝向，这些方法在低噪声、低外点的条件下表现良好，但随着噪声和外点水平的增加，其准确性往往会降低，或者计算成本变得十分昂贵。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种新颖的Hough变换在单位球面（S(2)）上的泛化方法，以估计相机的朝向。首先，该方法提取两帧之间的对应点，并为每对对应点生成一个兼容的方向大圆。然后，通过使用斐波那契格点离散化单位球面作为bin中心，每个大圆对一系列方向进行投票，从而确保不受噪声或动态对象影响的特征始终如一地投票支持正确的运动方向。在三个数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在准确性和效率方面都位于帕累托前沿。此外，在SLAM上的实验表明，通过在相机姿态初始化期间校正朝向，所提出的方法降低了RMSE。

title: An Empirical Analysis of Cooperative Perception for Occlusion Risk Mitigation
summary: Occlusions present a significant challenge for connected and automated vehicles, as they can obscure critical road users from perception systems. Traditional risk metrics often fail to capture the cumulative nature of these threats over time adequately. In this paper, we propose a novel and universal risk assessment metric, the Risk of Tracking Loss (RTL), which aggregates instantaneous risk intensity throughout occluded periods. This provides a holistic risk profile that encompasses both high-intensity, short-term threats and prolonged exposure. Utilizing diverse and high-fidelity real-world datasets, a large-scale statistical analysis is conducted to characterize occlusion risk and validate the effectiveness of the proposed metric. The metric is applied to evaluate different vehicle-to-everything (V2X) deployment strategies. Our study shows that full V2X penetration theoretically eliminates this risk, the reduction is highly nonlinear; a substantial statistical benefit requires a high penetration threshold of 75-90%. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel asymmetric communication framework that allows even non-connected vehicles to receive warnings. Experimental results demonstrate that this paradigm achieves better risk mitigation performance. We found that our approach at 25% penetration outperforms the traditional symmetric model at 75%, and benefits saturate at only 50% penetration. This work provides a crucial risk assessment metric and a cost-effective, strategic roadmap for accelerating the safety benefits of V2X deployment.
tldr: This paper introduces a new risk metric (RTL) for occlusion risk mitigation in connected and automated vehicles, and proposes an asymmetric V2X communication framework that outperforms symmetric V2X deployment at lower penetration rates.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的风险指标(RTL)，用于降低互联和自动驾驶车辆中的遮挡风险，并提出了一种非对称V2X通信框架，该框架在较低的渗透率下优于对称V2X部署。
summary_zh: 遮挡对互联和自动驾驶车辆提出了重大挑战，因为它们可能使感知系统无法识别关键的道路使用者。传统的风险指标通常无法充分捕捉这些威胁随时间推移的累积性质。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且通用的风险评估指标——跟踪丢失风险（RTL），它聚合了整个遮挡期间的瞬时风险强度。这提供了一个全面的风险概况，既包括高强度、短期的威胁，也包括长时间的暴露。通过使用多样化和高保真度的真实世界数据集，我们进行了大规模的统计分析，以表征遮挡风险并验证所提出指标的有效性。该指标被应用于评估不同的车联网（V2X）部署策略。我们的研究表明，完全的V2X普及在理论上消除了这种风险，但其减少是非线性的；要获得显著的统计效益，需要75-90%的高普及率阈值。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种新颖的不对称通信框架，允许即使是非互联车辆也能接收到警告。实验结果表明，这种范式实现了更好的风险缓解性能。我们发现，我们提出的方法在25%的普及率下优于传统的对称模型在75%的普及率下的表现，并且收益只在50%的普及率下达到饱和。这项工作提供了一个关键的风险评估指标，以及一个具有成本效益、战略性的路线图，以加速V2X部署的安全效益。

title: Considering Perspectives for Automated Driving Ethics: Collective Risk in Vehicular Motion Planning
summary: Recent automated vehicle (AV) motion planning strategies evolve around minimizing risk in road traffic. However, they exclusively consider risk from the AV's perspective and, as such, do not address the ethicality of its decisions for other road users. We argue that this does not reduce the risk of each road user, as risk may be different from the perspective of each road user. Indeed, minimizing the risk from the AV's perspective may not imply that the risk from the perspective of other road users is also being minimized; in fact, it may even increase. To test this hypothesis, we propose an AV motion planning strategy that supports switching risk minimization strategies between all road user perspectives. We find that the risk from the perspective of other road users can generally be considered different to the risk from the AV's perspective. Taking a collective risk perspective, i.e., balancing the risks of all road users, we observe an AV that minimizes overall traffic risk the best, while putting itself at slightly higher risk for the benefit of others, which is consistent with human driving behavior. In addition, adopting a collective risk minimization strategy can also be beneficial to the AV's travel efficiency by acting assertively when other road users maintain a low risk estimate of the AV. Yet, the AV drives conservatively when its planned actions are less predictable to other road users, i.e., associated with high risk. We argue that such behavior is a form of self-reflection and a natural prerequisite for socially acceptable AV behavior. We conclude that to facilitate ethicality in road traffic that includes AVs, the risk-perspective of each road user must be considered in the decision-making of AVs.
tldr: This paper proposes an AV motion planning strategy that considers the risk perspectives of all road users, aiming to minimize overall traffic risk and achieve more ethical and socially acceptable AV behavior. The experiments demonstrate a balance between the AV's safety and the safety of other road users.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种自动驾驶车辆运动规划策略，该策略考虑了所有道路使用者的风险视角，旨在最小化整体交通风险，并实现更道德、更易于接受的自动驾驶车辆行为。实验表明，自动驾驶车辆的安全性和其他道路使用者的安全性之间可以实现平衡。
summary_zh: 近期的自动驾驶车辆（AV）运动规划策略主要围绕最小化道路交通中的风险展开。然而，它们仅从自动驾驶车辆的角度考虑风险，因此没有解决其决策对其他道路使用者的伦理问题。我们认为这并不能降低每个道路使用者的风险，因为从每个道路使用者的角度来看，风险可能是不同的。事实上，最小化自动驾驶车辆角度的风险并不意味着其他道路使用者角度的风险也被最小化；实际上，它甚至可能增加风险。为了验证这个假设，我们提出了一种自动驾驶车辆运动规划策略，该策略支持在所有道路使用者视角之间切换风险最小化策略。我们发现，从其他道路使用者角度来看，风险通常被认为与自动驾驶车辆角度的风险不同。采取集体风险视角，即平衡所有道路使用者的风险，我们观察到自动驾驶车辆能够最好地最小化总体交通风险，同时为了他人的利益，将自身置于略高的风险之中，这与人类的驾驶行为一致。此外，采用集体风险最小化策略也有利于自动驾驶车辆的通行效率，当其他道路使用者对自动驾驶车辆保持较低的风险估计时，可以采取更自信的行动。然而，当自动驾驶车辆的计划行动对其他道路使用者来说不太可预测时，即与高风险相关时，自动驾驶车辆的驾驶会更加保守。我们认为这种行为是一种自我反思，也是实现社会可接受的自动驾驶车辆行为的自然先决条件。我们的结论是，为了促进包含自动驾驶车辆的道路交通中的伦理行为，必须在自动驾驶车辆的决策过程中考虑每个道路使用者的风险视角。

title: Bayesian Preference Elicitation: Human-In-The-Loop Optimization of An Active Prosthesis
summary: Tuning active prostheses for people with amputation is time-consuming and relies on metrics that may not fully reflect user needs. We introduce a human-in-the-loop optimization (HILO) approach that leverages direct user preferences to personalize a standard four-parameter prosthesis controller efficiently. Our method employs preference-based Multiobjective Bayesian Optimization that uses a state-or-the-art acquisition function especially designed for preference learning, and includes two algorithmic variants: a discrete version (\textit{EUBO-LineCoSpar}), and a continuous version (\textit{BPE4Prost}). Simulation results on benchmark functions and real-application trials demonstrate efficient convergence, robust preference elicitation, and measurable biomechanical improvements, illustrating the potential of preference-driven tuning for user-centered prosthesis control.
tldr: This paper presents a Human-In-The-Loop Optimization (HILO) approach using Bayesian Optimization with preference elicitation to personalize active prosthesis controllers based on direct user preferences, demonstrating efficient convergence and biomechanical improvements.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种人机回路优化（HILO）方法，利用贝叶斯优化和偏好诱导，根据用户的直接偏好来个性化主动假肢控制器，并展示了高效的收敛性和生物力学改进。
summary_zh: 针对截肢患者的主动义肢调优耗时且依赖于可能无法完全反映用户需求的指标。我们引入了一种人机回路优化（HILO）方法，该方法利用直接的用户偏好来高效地个性化一个标准的四参数义肢控制器。我们的方法采用基于偏好的多目标贝叶斯优化，该优化使用一种专门为偏好学习设计的先进采集函数，并且包含两种算法变体：一种离散版本（\textit{EUBO-LineCoSpar}）和一种连续版本（\textit{BPE4Prost}）。在基准函数上的仿真结果和实际应用试验都证明了高效的收敛性、稳健的偏好获取以及可测量的生物力学改进，表明了偏好驱动调优在以用户为中心的义肢控制方面的潜力。

title: Hierarchical Trajectory Planning of Floating-Base Multi-Link Robot for Maneuvering in Confined Environments
summary: Floating-base multi-link robots can change their shape during flight, making them well-suited for applications in confined environments such as autonomous inspection and search and rescue. However, trajectory planning for such systems remains an open challenge because the problem lies in a high-dimensional, constraint-rich space where collision avoidance must be addressed together with kinematic limits and dynamic feasibility. This work introduces a hierarchical trajectory planning framework that integrates global guidance with configuration-aware local optimization. First, we exploit the dual nature of these robots - the root link as a rigid body for guidance and the articulated joints for flexibility - to generate global anchor states that decompose the planning problem into tractable segments. Second, we design a local trajectory planner that optimizes each segment in parallel with differentiable objectives and constraints, systematically enforcing kinematic feasibility and maintaining dynamic feasibility by avoiding control singularities. Third, we implement a complete system that directly processes point-cloud data, eliminating the need for handcrafted obstacle models. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments confirm that this framework enables an articulated aerial robot to exploit its morphology for maneuvering that rigid robots cannot achieve. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first planning framework for floating-base multi-link robots that has been demonstrated on a real robot to generate continuous, collision-free, and dynamically feasible trajectories directly from raw point-cloud inputs, without relying on handcrafted obstacle models.
tldr: This paper introduces a hierarchical trajectory planning framework for floating-base multi-link robots in confined environments, demonstrated with real-world experiments directly processing point-cloud data.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于在狭窄环境中漂浮多连杆机器人的分层轨迹规划框架，并通过直接处理点云数据的真实世界实验进行了演示。
summary_zh: 漂浮基座多连杆机器人能够在飞行过程中改变形状，使其非常适合自主巡检和搜索救援等受限环境中的应用。然而，此类系统的轨迹规划仍然是一个开放的挑战，因为该问题存在于高维、约束丰富的空间中，必须同时解决避障问题以及运动学极限和动力学可行性。本文介绍了一种分层轨迹规划框架，该框架集成了全局引导和配置感知的局部优化。首先，我们利用这些机器人的双重特性——根连杆作为刚性体进行引导，铰接关节用于灵活性——来生成全局锚点状态，从而将规划问题分解为可处理的片段。其次，我们设计了一个局部轨迹规划器，该规划器使用可微的目标和约束并行优化每个片段，系统地强制执行运动学可行性，并通过避免控制奇异性来保持动力学可行性。第三，我们实现了一个完整的系统，该系统直接处理点云数据，无需手工制作障碍物模型。大量的仿真和真实世界实验证实，该框架使铰接式空中机器人能够利用其形态进行刚性机器人无法实现的机动。据我们所知，这是第一个漂浮基座多连杆机器人的规划框架，它已在真实机器人上得到验证，可以直接从原始点云输入生成连续、无碰撞且动力学可行的轨迹，而无需依赖手工制作的障碍物模型。

title: Evaluating Stochasticity in Deep Research Agents
summary: Deep Research Agents (DRAs) are promising agentic systems that gather and synthesize information to support research across domains such as financial decision-making, medical analysis, and scientific discovery. Despite recent improvements in research quality (e.g., outcome accuracy when ground truth is available), DRA system design often overlooks a critical barrier to real-world deployment: stochasticity. Under identical queries, repeated executions of DRAs can exhibit substantial variability in terms of research outcome, findings, and citations. In this paper, we formalize the study of stochasticity in DRAs by modeling them as information acquisition Markov Decision Processes. We introduce an evaluation framework that quantifies variance in the system and identify three sources of it: information acquisition, information compression, and inference. Through controlled experiments, we investigate how stochasticity from these modules across different decision steps influences the variance of DRA outputs. Our results show that reducing stochasticity can improve research output quality, with inference and early-stage stochasticity contributing the most to DRA output variance. Based on these findings, we propose strategies for mitigating stochasticity while maintaining output quality via structured output and ensemble-based query generation. Our experiments on DeepSearchQA show that our proposed mitigation methods reduce average stochasticity by 22% while maintaining high research quality.
tldr: This paper formalizes the study of stochasticity in Deep Research Agents (DRAs), identifies its sources, and proposes mitigation strategies to improve research output quality.
tldr_zh: 本文形式化研究了深度研究型代理 (DRA) 中的随机性，确定了其来源，并提出了缓解策略以提高研究输出质量。
summary_zh: 深度研究智能体（DRAs）是一种极具前景的智能体系统，它能够收集和综合信息，以支持金融决策、医学分析和科学发现等领域的研究。尽管最近在研究质量方面有所提高（例如，在存在真值时结果的准确性），但DRA系统设计通常忽略了实际部署中的一个关键障碍：随机性。在相同的查询条件下，DRA的重复执行可能会在研究结果、发现和引用方面表现出显著的变异性。在本文中，我们通过将DRA建模为信息获取马尔可夫决策过程，正式研究了DRA中的随机性。我们引入了一个评估框架，量化系统中的方差，并识别了三个来源：信息获取、信息压缩和推理。通过受控实验，我们研究了这些模块在不同决策步骤中的随机性如何影响DRA输出的方差。我们的结果表明，降低随机性可以提高研究输出质量，其中推理和早期阶段的随机性对DRA输出方差的贡献最大。基于这些发现，我们提出了在保持输出质量的同时缓解随机性的策略，包括结构化输出和基于集成方法的查询生成。我们在DeepSearchQA上的实验表明，我们提出的缓解方法在保持较高研究质量的同时，平均降低了22%的随机性。

title: AgentDropoutV2: Optimizing Information Flow in Multi-Agent Systems via Test-Time Rectify-or-Reject Pruning
summary: While Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) excel in complex reasoning, they suffer from the cascading impact of erroneous information generated by individual participants. Current solutions often resort to rigid structural engineering or expensive fine-tuning, limiting their deployability and adaptability. We propose AgentDropoutV2, a test-time rectify-or-reject pruning framework designed to dynamically optimize MAS information flow without retraining. Our approach acts as an active firewall, intercepting agent outputs and employing a retrieval-augmented rectifier to iteratively correct errors based on a failure-driven indicator pool. This mechanism allows for the precise identification of potential errors using distilled failure patterns as prior knowledge. Irreparable outputs are subsequently pruned to prevent error propagation, while a fallback strategy preserves system integrity. Empirical results on extensive math benchmarks show that AgentDropoutV2 significantly boosts the MAS's task performance, achieving an average accuracy gain of 6.3 percentage points on math benchmarks. Furthermore, the system exhibits robust generalization and adaptivity, dynamically modulating rectification efforts based on task difficulty while leveraging context-aware indicators to resolve a wide spectrum of error patterns. Our code and dataset are released at https://github.com/TonySY2/AgentDropoutV2.
tldr: The paper introduces AgentDropoutV2, a test-time framework that dynamically optimizes information flow in multi-agent systems by rectifying or rejecting erroneous agent outputs using a retrieval-augmented rectifier and failure-driven indicators, demonstrating improved accuracy on math benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AgentDropoutV2，一种测试时框架，通过使用检索增强校正器和失败驱动的指标来校正或拒绝错误的代理输出，从而动态优化多代理系统中的信息流，并在数学基准测试中展示了准确性的提高。
summary_zh: 多智能体系统(MAS)在复杂推理方面表现出色，但易受个体参与者产生的错误信息带来的级联影响。目前的解决方案通常依赖于僵化的结构工程或昂贵的微调，限制了其部署性和适应性。我们提出了AgentDropoutV2，一种测试时纠正或拒绝的剪枝框架，旨在动态优化MAS的信息流，而无需重新训练。我们的方法充当一个主动防火墙，拦截智能体输出，并采用一种检索增强纠正器，基于故障驱动的指示器池迭代修正错误。该机制允许使用提炼出的故障模式作为先验知识，精确识别潜在错误。不可修复的输出随后被剪枝，以防止错误传播，而一种回退策略则保留了系统的完整性。大量数学基准测试的经验结果表明，AgentDropoutV2显著提高了MAS的任务性能，在数学基准测试上平均实现了6.3个百分点的准确率提升。此外，该系统表现出强大的泛化能力和适应性，能够根据任务难度动态调节纠正力度，同时利用上下文感知的指示器来解决广泛的错误模式。我们的代码和数据集已发布在https://github.com/TonySY2/AgentDropoutV2。

title: Accelerated Online Risk-Averse Policy Evaluation in POMDPs with Theoretical Guarantees and Novel CVaR Bounds
summary: Risk-averse decision-making under uncertainty in partially observable domains is a central challenge in artificial intelligence and is essential for developing reliable autonomous agents. The formal framework for such problems is the partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP), where risk sensitivity is introduced through a risk measure applied to the value function, with Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) being a particularly significant criterion. However, solving POMDPs is computationally intractable in general, and approximate methods rely on computationally expensive simulations of future agent trajectories. This work introduces a theoretical framework for accelerating CVaR value function evaluation in POMDPs with formal performance guarantees. We derive new bounds on the CVaR of a random variable X using an auxiliary random variable Y, under assumptions relating their cumulative distribution and density functions; these bounds yield interpretable concentration inequalities and converge as the distributional discrepancy vanishes. Building on this, we establish upper and lower bounds on the CVaR value function computable from a simplified belief-MDP, accommodating general simplifications of the transition dynamics. We develop estimators for these bounds within a particle-belief MDP framework with probabilistic guarantees, and employ them for acceleration via action elimination: actions whose bounds indicate suboptimality under the simplified model are safely discarded while ensuring consistency with the original POMDP. Empirical evaluation across multiple POMDP domains confirms that the bounds reliably separate safe from dangerous policies while achieving substantial computational speedups under the simplified model.
tldr: This paper introduces a method for accelerating risk-averse policy evaluation in POMDPs, using novel CVaR bounds and a simplified belief-MDP, with theoretical guarantees and empirical validation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种加速POMDP中风险规避策略评估的方法，该方法利用了新的CVaR界限和简化的信念-MDP，并提供了理论保证和经验验证。
summary_zh: 在部分可观测领域中，不确定性下的风险规避决策是人工智能领域的一个核心挑战，并且对于开发可靠的自主智能体至关重要。此类问题的正式框架是部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），其中风险敏感性通过应用于价值函数的风险度量引入，条件风险值（CVaR）是一个特别重要的标准。然而，求解POMDP在一般情况下计算上是难以处理的，并且近似方法依赖于计算代价昂贵的未来智能体轨迹的模拟。 本文介绍了一个理论框架，用于在POMDP中加速CVaR价值函数的评估，并具有正式的性能保证。 我们利用辅助随机变量Y推导了随机变量X的CVaR的新界限，假设它们的累积分布函数和密度函数之间存在关系；这些界限产生了可解释的集中不等式，并随着分布差异的消失而收敛。 在此基础上，我们建立了可以在简化的信念-MDP中计算的CVaR价值函数的上下界，并适应转变动态的通用简化。 我们在具有概率保证的粒子信念-MDP框架内开发了这些界限的估计器，并将其用于通过动作消除进行加速：在简化模型下，其界限表明次优的动作会被安全地丢弃，同时确保与原始POMDP的一致性。跨多个POMDP领域的实证评估证实，这些界限能够可靠地将安全策略与危险策略区分开来，同时在简化模型下实现了显著的计算加速。

title: Learning-based Multi-agent Race Strategies in Formula 1
summary: In Formula 1, race strategies are adapted according to evolving race conditions and competitors' actions. This paper proposes a reinforcement learning approach for multi-agent race strategy optimization. Agents learn to balance energy management, tire degradation, aerodynamic interaction, and pit-stop decisions. Building on a pre-trained single-agent policy, we introduce an interaction module that accounts for the behavior of competitors. The combination of the interaction module and a self-play training scheme generates competitive policies, and agents are ranked based on their relative performance. Results show that the agents adapt pit timing, tire selection, and energy allocation in response to opponents, achieving robust and consistent race performance. Because the framework relies only on information available during real races, it can support race strategists' decisions before and during races.
tldr: This paper presents a reinforcement learning approach for multi-agent race strategy optimization in Formula 1, where agents learn to adapt to race conditions and opponents' actions, demonstrating robust race performance using information available in real races.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于F1一级方程式中多智能体比赛策略优化的强化学习方法。智能体学习适应比赛条件和对手的行动，并且只使用真实比赛中可用的信息，展示了强大的比赛性能。
summary_zh: 在一级方程式赛车中，比赛策略会根据不断变化的比赛状况和竞争对手的行为进行调整。本文提出了一种基于强化学习的多智能体比赛策略优化方法。智能体学习平衡能量管理、轮胎衰减、空气动力学交互以及进站决策。在预训练的单智能体策略的基础上，我们引入了一个交互模块，用于考虑竞争对手的行为。交互模块和自博弈训练方案的结合生成了具有竞争力的策略，并根据智能体的相对表现对其进行排名。结果表明，智能体能够根据对手的情况调整进站时机、轮胎选择和能量分配，从而实现稳健且一致的比赛表现。由于该框架仅依赖于真实比赛中可获得的信息，因此它可以在比赛前和比赛期间为比赛策略师的决策提供支持。

title: Same Words, Different Judgments: Modality Effects on Preference Alignment
summary: Preference-based reinforcement learning (PbRL) is the dominant framework for aligning AI systems to human preferences, but its application to speech remains underexplored. We present a controlled cross-modal study of human and synthetic preference annotations, comparing text and audio evaluations of identical semantic content across 100 prompts. Audio preferences prove as reliable as text, with inter-rater agreement reaching good levels (ICC(2,k) $\approx$ .80) at $\sim$9 raters -- the first ICC-based reliability characterization in the preference annotation literature for either modality. However, modality reshapes how people judge: audio raters exhibit narrower decision thresholds, reduced length bias, and more user-oriented evaluation criteria, with near-chance cross-modality agreement. Synthetic ratings further align with human judgments and predict inter-rater agreement, supporting their use both for triaging ambiguous pairs and as full replacements for human annotations.
tldr: This paper investigates modality effects (text vs. audio) on human preference ratings in Preference-based Reinforcement Learning (PbRL), finding that audio preferences are reliable but differ in judgment criteria compared to text. Synthetic ratings can effectively approximate human judgments.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了基于偏好的强化学习（PbRL）中，文本和音频两种模态对人类偏好评级的影响，发现音频偏好是可靠的，但在判断标准上与文本评级不同。合成评级可以有效地近似人类的判断。
summary_zh: 基于偏好的强化学习 (PbRL) 是使人工智能系统与人类偏好对齐的主导框架，但其在语音领域的应用仍待探索。我们进行了一项受控的跨模态研究，比较人类和合成的偏好标注，评估100个提示语下相同语义内容的文本和音频。音频偏好证明与文本一样可靠，当注释者数量达到约9人时，评分者间一致性达到了良好水平 (ICC(2,k) $\approx$ .80)——这是偏好标注文献中首次基于ICC的可靠性表征，适用于两种模态。然而，模态重塑了人们的判断方式：音频评分者表现出更窄的决策阈值、更少的长度偏见和更以用户为导向的评估标准，跨模态一致性接近随机水平。合成评分进一步与人类判断对齐，并预测评分者间一致性，支持将其用于筛选模糊对以及完全替代人类标注。

title: Autoregressive Visual Decoding from EEG Signals
summary: Electroencephalogram (EEG) signals have become a popular medium for decoding visual information due to their cost-effectiveness and high temporal resolution. However, current approaches face significant challenges in bridging the modality gap between EEG and image data. These methods typically rely on complex adaptation processes involving multiple stages, making it hard to maintain consistency and manage compounding errors. Furthermore, the computational overhead imposed by large-scale diffusion models limit their practicality in real-world brain-computer interface (BCI) applications. In this work, we present AVDE, a lightweight and efficient framework for visual decoding from EEG signals. First, we leverage LaBraM, a pre-trained EEG model, and fine-tune it via contrastive learning to align EEG and image representations. Second, we adopt an autoregressive generative framework based on a "next-scale prediction" strategy: images are encoded into multi-scale token maps using a pre-trained VQ-VAE, and a transformer is trained to autoregressively predict finer-scale tokens starting from EEG embeddings as the coarsest representation. This design enables coherent generation while preserving a direct connection between the input EEG signals and the reconstructed images. Experiments on two datasets show that AVDE outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods in both image retrieval and reconstruction tasks, while using only 10% of the parameters. In addition, visualization of intermediate outputs shows that the generative process of AVDE reflects the hierarchical nature of human visual perception. These results highlight the potential of autoregressive models as efficient and interpretable tools for practical BCI applications.
tldr: This paper introduces AVDE, a lightweight autoregressive framework for decoding visual information from EEG signals, achieving state-of-the-art performance in image retrieval and reconstruction with significantly fewer parameters than previous methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种轻量级的自回归框架AVDE，用于从脑电图信号中解码视觉信息，在图像检索和重建方面实现了最先进的性能，且参数量明显少于以往的方法。
summary_zh: 脑电图 (EEG) 信号因其经济高效和高时间分辨率，已成为解码视觉信息的常用媒介。然而，目前的方法在弥合 EEG 和图像数据之间的模态差距方面面临着重大挑战。这些方法通常依赖于包含多个阶段的复杂适应过程，难以保持一致性并管理累积误差。此外，大规模扩散模型带来的计算开销限制了它们在实际脑机接口 (BCI) 应用中的实用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AVDE，一个轻量级且高效的框架，用于从 EEG 信号中进行视觉解码。首先，我们利用 LaBraM，一个预训练的 EEG 模型，并通过对比学习对其进行微调，以对齐 EEG 和图像表示。其次，我们采用基于“下一尺度预测”策略的自回归生成框架：图像被编码成多尺度令牌图，使用一个预训练的 VQ-VAE，并训练一个 transformer 从 EEG 嵌入（作为最粗糙的表示）开始自回归地预测更精细的尺度令牌。这种设计实现了连贯的生成，同时保留了输入 EEG 信号和重建图像之间的直接联系。在两个数据集上的实验表明，AVDE 在图像检索和重建任务中均优于先前的最先进方法，同时仅使用了 10% 的参数。此外，中间输出的可视化表明 AVDE 的生成过程反映了人类视觉感知的层级特性。这些结果突出了自回归模型作为高效且可解释的工具在实际 BCI 应用中的潜力。

title: AeroDGS: Physically Consistent Dynamic Gaussian Splatting for Single-Sequence Aerial 4D Reconstruction
summary: Recent advances in 4D scene reconstruction have significantly improved dynamic modeling across various domains. However, existing approaches remain limited under aerial conditions with single-view capture, wide spatial range, and dynamic objects of limited spatial footprint and large motion disparity. These challenges cause severe depth ambiguity and unstable motion estimation, making monocular aerial reconstruction inherently ill-posed. To this end, we present AeroDGS, a physics-guided 4D Gaussian splatting framework for monocular UAV videos. AeroDGS introduces a Monocular Geometry Lifting module that reconstructs reliable static and dynamic geometry from a single aerial sequence, providing a robust basis for dynamic estimation. To further resolve monocular ambiguity, we propose a Physics-Guided Optimization module that incorporates differentiable ground-support, upright-stability, and trajectory-smoothness priors, transforming ambiguous image cues into physically consistent motion. The framework jointly refines static backgrounds and dynamic entities with stable geometry and coherent temporal evolution. We additionally build a real-world UAV dataset that spans various altitudes and motion conditions to evaluate dynamic aerial reconstruction. Experiments on synthetic and real UAV scenes demonstrate that AeroDGS outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior reconstruction fidelity in dynamic aerial environments.
tldr: The paper introduces AeroDGS, a physics-guided dynamic Gaussian splatting framework for 4D reconstruction from monocular UAV video, addressing challenges of depth ambiguity and unstable motion estimation in aerial environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AeroDGS，一个基于物理先验的动态高斯溅射框架，用于从单目无人机视频进行4D重建，解决了航拍环境中深度歧义和不稳定运动估计的难题。
summary_zh: 近年来，四维场景重建的进展显著提升了各领域中的动态建模能力。然而，现有方法在单视角航拍、广阔空间范围以及具有有限空间足迹和较大运动差异的动态目标等空中条件下仍然受限。这些挑战导致严重的深度歧义和不稳定的运动估计，使得单目空中重建本质上是不适定的。为此，我们提出了AeroDGS，一个物理引导的四维高斯溅射框架，用于单目无人机视频。AeroDGS引入了一个单目几何提升模块，该模块从单个空中序列中重建可靠的静态和动态几何，为动态估计提供稳健的基础。为了进一步解决单目歧义，我们提出了一个物理引导的优化模块，该模块结合了可微的地面支撑、直立稳定性以及轨迹平滑度先验，将模糊的图像线索转化为物理上一致的运动。该框架联合优化静态背景和动态实体，使其具有稳定的几何形状和连贯的时间演化。我们还构建了一个真实世界的无人机数据集，涵盖了各种高度和运动条件，以评估动态空中重建。在合成和真实无人机场景上的实验表明，AeroDGS优于最先进的方法，在动态空中环境中实现了卓越的重建保真度。

title: ProjFlow: Projection Sampling with Flow Matching for Zero-Shot Exact Spatial Motion Control
summary: Generating human motion with precise spatial control is a challenging problem. Existing approaches often require task-specific training or slow optimization, and enforcing hard constraints frequently disrupts motion naturalness. Building on the observation that many animation tasks can be formulated as a linear inverse problem, we introduce ProjFlow, a training-free sampler that achieves zero-shot, exact satisfaction of linear spatial constraints while preserving motion realism. Our key advance is a novel kinematics-aware metric that encodes skeletal topology. This metric allows the sampler to enforce hard constraints by distributing corrections coherently across the entire skeleton, avoiding the unnatural artifacts of naive projection. Furthermore, for sparse inputs, such as filling in long gaps between a few keyframes, we introduce a time-varying formulation using pseudo-observations that fade during sampling. Extensive experiments on representative applications, motion inpainting, and 2D-to-3D lifting, demonstrate that ProjFlow achieves exact constraint satisfaction and matches or improves realism over zero-shot baselines, while remaining competitive with training-based controllers.
tldr: The paper introduces ProjFlow, a training-free sampler for generating human motion with precise spatial control by satisfying linear constraints using a novel kinematics-aware metric. It demonstrates zero-shot performance competitive with training-based methods on tasks like motion inpainting and 2D-to-3D lifting.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ProjFlow，一种无需训练的采样器，通过使用新颖的运动学感知指标来满足线性约束，从而生成具有精确空间控制的人体运动。它在运动修复和2D到3D提升等任务上展示了与基于训练的方法相比具有竞争力的零样本性能。
summary_zh:
摘要：
精确控制空间生成人体运动是一个具有挑战性的问题。现有方法通常需要特定任务的训练或缓慢的优化，并且强制硬约束往往会破坏运动的自然性。基于许多动画任务可以被公式化为线性逆问题的观察，我们引入 ProjFlow，一种训练自由的采样器，它实现了线性空间约束的零样本、精确满足，同时保留了运动的真实感。我们的关键进展是一种新颖的、感知运动学的度量，该度量编码了骨骼拓扑结构。这种度量允许采样器通过在整个骨骼上连贯地分布校正来实现硬约束，从而避免了简单投影所带来的不自然artifact。此外，对于稀疏输入，例如填充几个关键帧之间的长间隙，我们引入了一种使用伪观测的时间变化公式，这些伪观测在采样过程中逐渐消失。在代表性应用、运动修复和 2D 到 3D 提升的大量实验表明，ProjFlow 实现了精确的约束满足，并且在零样本基线上匹配或改进了真实感，同时保持了与基于训练的控制器的竞争力。

title: GIFSplat: Generative Prior-Guided Iterative Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting from Sparse Views
summary: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction offers substantial runtime advantages over per-scene optimization, which remains slow at inference and often fragile under sparse views. However, existing feed-forward methods still have potential for further performance gains, especially for out-of-domain data, and struggle to retain second-level inference time once a generative prior is introduced. These limitations stem from the one-shot prediction paradigm in existing feed-forward pipeline: models are strictly bounded by capacity, lack inference-time refinement, and are ill-suited for continuously injecting generative priors. We introduce GIFSplat, a purely feed-forward iterative refinement framework for 3D Gaussian Splatting from sparse unposed views. A small number of forward-only residual updates progressively refine current 3D scene using rendering evidence, achieve favorable balance between efficiency and quality. Furthermore, we distill a frozen diffusion prior into Gaussian-level cues from enhanced novel renderings without gradient backpropagation or ever-increasing view-set expansion, thereby enabling per-scene adaptation with generative prior while preserving feed-forward efficiency. Across DL3DV, RealEstate10K, and DTU, GIFSplat consistently outperforms state-of-the-art feed-forward baselines, improving PSNR by up to +2.1 dB, and it maintains second-scale inference time without requiring camera poses or any test-time gradient optimization.
tldr: GIFSplat introduces an iterative feed-forward framework for 3D Gaussian Splatting from sparse views, enabling efficient and high-quality reconstruction with generative priors, outperforming existing feed-forward methods.
tldr_zh: GIFSplat 提出了一个迭代的前馈框架，用于从稀疏视图进行 3D Gaussian Splatting，通过生成先验实现高效和高质量的重建，优于现有的前馈方法。
summary_zh: 前馈式3D重建相比于逐场景优化，在运行时具有显著优势，后者在推理时速度慢且在稀疏视角下常变得脆弱。然而，现有的前馈方法仍有进一步提高性能的潜力，尤其是在域外数据上，并且一旦引入生成先验，就难以保持亚秒级的推理时间。这些局限性源于现有前馈流程中的一次性预测范式：模型受到容量的严格限制，缺乏推理时的精细化，并且不适合持续注入生成先验。我们引入了GIFSplat，一个纯粹的前馈迭代精细化框架，用于从稀疏的未定位姿态视角进行3D高斯溅射。少量仅前向的残差更新利用渲染证据逐步精细化当前的3D场景，在效率和质量之间取得良好的平衡。此外，我们把一个冻结的扩散先验提炼成高斯层级的线索，这些线索来自增强的新视角渲染，而无需梯度反向传播或不断增加的视角集合扩展，从而能够在保持前馈效率的同时，利用生成先验进行逐场景自适应。在DL3DV、RealEstate10K和DTU上，GIFSplat始终优于最先进的前馈基线，PSNR最多提高+2.1 dB，并且在不需要相机姿态或任何测试时梯度优化的情况下，保持亚秒级的推理时间。

title: DigiArm: An Anthropomorphic 3D-Printed Prosthetic Hand with Enhanced Dexterity for Typing Tasks
summary: Despite recent advancements, existing prosthetic limbs are unable to replicate the dexterity and intuitive control of the human hand. Current control systems for prosthetic hands are often limited to grasping, and commercial prosthetic hands lack the precision needed for dexterous manipulation or applications that require fine finger motions. Thus, there is a critical need for accessible and replicable prosthetic designs that enable individuals to interact with electronic devices and perform precise finger pressing, such as keyboard typing or piano playing, while preserving current prosthetic capabilities. This paper presents a low-cost, lightweight, 3D-printed robotic prosthetic hand, specifically engineered for enhanced dexterity with electronic devices such as a computer keyboard or piano, as well as general object manipulation. The robotic hand features a mechanism to adjust finger abduction/adduction spacing, a 2-D wrist with the inclusion of controlled ulnar/radial deviation optimized for typing, and control of independent finger pressing. We conducted a study to demonstrate how participants can use the robotic hand to perform keyboard typing and piano playing in real time, with different levels of finger and wrist motion. This supports the notion that our proposed design can allow for the execution of key typing motions more effectively than before, aiming to enhance the functionality of prosthetic hands.
tldr: The paper presents a low-cost, 3D-printed prosthetic hand, DigiArm, designed for enhanced dexterity in typing and piano playing, featuring adjustable finger spacing, a 2-D wrist, and independent finger control demonstrated through a user study.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种低成本的3D打印假肢手DigiArm，旨在增强打字和弹钢琴的灵活性，具有可调节的手指间距、二维手腕和独立的手指控制，并通过用户研究进行了演示。
summary_zh: 尽管近来取得了一些进展，但现有的假肢仍然无法复制人手的灵巧性和直观控制。目前假肢手的控制系统通常仅限于抓握，并且商用假肢手缺乏精细操作或需要精细手指运动的应用所需的精度。因此，迫切需要可访问且可复制的假肢设计，使个体能够在保留当前假肢功能的同时，与电子设备交互并执行精确的手指按压操作，例如键盘打字或钢琴演奏。本文提出了一种低成本、轻量级、3D打印的机器人假肢手，专门为增强与电子设备（如电脑键盘或钢琴）的灵巧性以及一般的物体操作而设计。该机器人手的特点是具有调节手指外展/内收间距的机制、用于控制尺桡偏斜并针对打字进行了优化的二维腕关节，以及独立的手指按压控制。我们进行了一项研究，以证明参与者如何使用该机器人手实时执行键盘打字和钢琴演奏，并具有不同程度的手指和腕部运动。这支持了这样一种观点，即我们提出的设计能够比以往更有效地执行关键的打字动作，旨在增强假肢手的功能。

title: Automated Robotic Needle Puncture for Percutaneous Dilatational Tracheostomy
summary: Percutaneous dilatational tracheostomy (PDT) is frequently performed on patients in intensive care units for prolonged mechanical ventilation. The needle puncture, as the most critical step of PDT, could lead to adverse consequences such as major bleeding and posterior tracheal wall perforation if performed inaccurately. Current practices of PDT puncture are all performed manually with no navigation assistance, which leads to large position and angular errors (5 mm and 30 degree). To improve the accuracy and reduce the difficulty of the PDT procedure, we propose a system that automates the needle insertion using a velocity-controlled robotic manipulator. Guided using pose data from two electromagnetic sensors, one at the needle tip and the other inside the trachea, the robotic system uses an adaptive constrained controller to adapt the uncertain kinematic parameters online and avoid collisions with the patient's body and tissues near the target. Simulations were performed to validate the controller's implementation, and then four hundred PDT punctures were performed on a mannequin to evaluate the position and angular accuracy. The absolute median puncture position error was 1.7 mm (IQR: 1.9 mm) and midline deviation was 4.13 degree (IQR: 4.55 degree), measured by the sensor inside the trachea. The small deviations from the nominal puncture in a simulated experimental setup and formal guarantees of collision-free insertions suggest the feasibility of the robotic PDT puncture.
tldr: This paper presents an automated robotic system for percutaneous dilatational tracheostomy (PDT) needle insertion, addressing inaccuracies in manual procedures with improved position and angular accuracy demonstrated in mannequin experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于经皮扩张气管切开术（PDT）针头插入的自动化机器人系统，旨在解决手动操作中的不准确性，并在人体模型实验中证明了其改进的位置和角度精度。
summary_zh: 经皮扩张气管切开术 (PDT) 常用于重症监护病房接受长期机械通气的患者。作为 PDT 最关键的步骤，针穿刺如果操作不当，可能会导致严重出血和气管后壁穿孔等不良后果。目前的 PDT 穿刺操作均依靠手动进行，没有导航辅助，导致较大的位置和角度误差（5 毫米和 30 度）。为了提高 PDT 手术的准确性并降低难度，我们提出了一种使用速度控制机器人机械臂实现针插入自动化的系统。该机器人系统由安装在针尖和一个安装在气管内的两个电磁传感器提供的姿态数据引导，采用自适应约束控制器在线适应不确定的运动学参数，并避免与患者身体和目标附近组织发生碰撞。通过仿真验证了控制器的实施，然后在人体模型上进行了四百次 PDT 穿刺，以评估位置和角度精度。通过气管内的传感器测量，绝对中值穿刺位置误差为 1.7 毫米（四分位距：1.9 毫米），中线偏差为 4.13 度（四分位距：4.55 度）。 模拟实验设置中与标称穿刺点的小偏差以及无碰撞插入的正式保证表明了机器人 PDT 穿刺的可行性。

title: Sapling-NeRF: Geo-Localised Sapling Reconstruction in Forests for Ecological Monitoring
summary: Saplings are key indicators of forest regeneration and overall forest health. However, their fine-scale architectural traits are difficult to capture with existing 3D sensing methods, which make quantitative evaluation difficult. Terrestrial Laser Scanners (TLS), Mobile Laser Scanners (MLS), or traditional photogrammetry approaches poorly reconstruct thin branches, dense foliage, and lack the scale consistency needed for long-term monitoring. Implicit 3D reconstruction methods such as Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) are promising alternatives, but cannot recover the true scale of a scene and lack any means to be accurately geo-localised. In this paper, we present a pipeline which fuses NeRF, LiDAR SLAM, and GNSS to enable repeatable, geo-localised ecological monitoring of saplings. Our system proposes a three-level representation: (i) coarse Earth-frame localisation using GNSS, (ii) LiDAR-based SLAM for centimetre-accurate localisation and reconstruction, and (iii) NeRF-derived object-centric dense reconstruction of individual saplings. This approach enables repeatable quantitative evaluation and long-term monitoring of sapling traits. Our experiments in forest plots in Wytham Woods (Oxford, UK) and Evo (Finland) show that stem height, branching patterns, and leaf-to-wood ratios can be captured with increased accuracy as compared to TLS. We demonstrate that accurate stem skeletons and leaf distributions can be measured for saplings with heights between 0.5m and 2m in situ, giving ecologists access to richer structural and quantitative data for analysing forest dynamics.
tldr: The paper presents a system that combines NeRF, LiDAR SLAM, and GNSS for geo-localized, repeatable 3D reconstruction of saplings in forests, enabling more accurate ecological monitoring compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种结合NeRF、激光雷达SLAM和GNSS的系统，用于森林中幼树的地理定位、可重复的3D重建，与现有方法相比，能够实现更准确的生态监测。
summary_zh: 树苗是森林更新和整体森林健康的关键指标。然而，现有的三维感知方法难以捕捉到它们精细尺度的结构特征，这使得定量评估变得困难。地面激光扫描仪（TLS）、移动激光扫描仪（MLS）或传统摄影测量方法难以重构细小的树枝、密集的树叶，并且缺乏长期监测所需的尺度一致性。诸如神经辐射场（NeRF）和三维高斯溅射（3DGS）等隐式三维重建方法是一种有前景的替代方案，但无法恢复场景的真实尺度，并且缺乏准确定位地理位置的手段。在本文中，我们提出了一种融合NeRF、激光雷达SLAM和GNSS的流程，以实现可重复的、地理定位的树苗生态监测。我们的系统提出了一种三层表示：（i）使用GNSS进行粗略的地球坐标系定位，（ii）基于激光雷达的SLAM提供厘米级的精确定位和重建，以及（iii）NeRF导出的以对象为中心的单个树苗密集重建。这种方法能够对树苗的特征进行可重复的定量评估和长期监测。我们在英国牛津郡威瑟姆林（Wytham Woods）和芬兰埃沃（Evo）的森林样地中进行的实验表明，与TLS相比，茎高、分枝模式和叶木比能够以更高的精度捕获。我们证明了可以原位测量高度在0.5米到2米之间的树苗的精确树干骨架和叶片分布，从而使生态学家能够获得更丰富的结构和定量数据来分析森林动态。

title: ReCoN-Ipsundrum: An Inspectable Recurrent Persistence Loop Agent with Affect-Coupled Control and Mechanism-Linked Consciousness Indicator Assays
summary: Indicator-based approaches to machine consciousness recommend mechanism-linked evidence triangulated across tasks, supported by architectural inspection and causal intervention. Inspired by Humphrey's ipsundrum hypothesis, we implement ReCoN-Ipsundrum, an inspectable agent that extends a ReCoN state machine with a recurrent persistence loop over sensory salience Ns and an optional affect proxy reporting valence/arousal. Across fixed-parameter ablations (ReCoN, Ipsundrum, Ipsundrum+affect), we operationalize Humphrey's qualiaphilia (preference for sensory experience for its own sake) as a familiarity-controlled scenic-over-dull route choice. We find a novelty dissociation: non-affect variants are novelty-sensitive (Delta scenic-entry = 0.07). Affect coupling is stable (Delta scenic-entry = 0.01) even when scenic is less novel (median Delta novelty ~ -0.43). In reward-free exploratory play, the affect variant shows structured local investigation (scan events 31.4 vs. 0.9; cycle score 7.6). In a pain-tail probe, only the affect variant sustains prolonged planned caution (tail duration 90 vs. 5). Lesioning feedback+integration selectively reduces post-stimulus persistence in ipsundrum variants (AUC drop 27.62, 27.9%) while leaving ReCoN unchanged. These dissociations link recurrence -> persistence and affect-coupled control -> preference stability, scanning, and lingering caution, illustrating how indicator-like signatures can be engineered and why mechanistic and causal evidence should accompany behavioral markers.
tldr: The paper introduces ReCoN-Ipsundrum, an inspectable agent with a recurrent persistence loop and optional affect proxy, and demonstrates how affect-coupled control leads to preference stability and prolonged caution through ablation studies and mechanistic interventions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种可检查的智能体ReCoN-Ipsundrum，它具有循环持久性循环和可选的情感代理，并通过消融研究和机械干预，展示了情感耦合控制如何导致偏好稳定和持久谨慎。
summary_zh: 基于指标的机器意识方法推荐通过跨任务三角测量与机制相关的证据，并以架构检查和因果干预为支持。受Humphrey的ipsundrum假说的启发，我们实现了ReCoN-Ipsundrum，这是一个可检查的代理，它通过感官显著性Ns上的循环持久性回路以及一个可选的报告效价/唤醒度的情感代理来扩展ReCoN状态机。在固参消融（ReCoN、Ipsundrum、Ipsundrum+情感）中，我们将Humphrey的感受质嗜好（为了自身而偏爱感官体验）操作化为一种由熟悉度控制的，风景性优于沉闷性的路线选择。我们发现了一种新颖性解离：非情感变体对新颖性敏感（风景入口Delta = 0.07）。即使风景性较少地带有新颖性（中位数新颖性Delta ~ -0.43），情感耦合也是稳定的（风景入口Delta = 0.01）。在无奖励的探索性游戏中，情感变体表现出结构化的局部调查（扫描事件31.4 vs. 0.9；循环得分7.6）。在疼痛尾部探测中，只有情感变体能够维持长时间的计划性谨慎（尾部持续时间90 vs. 5）。损伤反馈+整合选择性地降低了ipsundrum变体中刺激后的持久性（AUC下降27.62%, 27.9%），而ReCoN则保持不变。这些解离将递归->持久性和情感耦合的控制->偏好稳定性、扫描和持续的谨慎联系起来，说明了如何设计类似指标的签名，以及为什么机制和因果证据应该伴随行为标记。

title: When Should an AI Act? A Human-Centered Model of Scene, Context, and Behavior for Agentic AI Design
summary: Agentic AI increasingly intervenes proactively by inferring users' situations from contextual data yet often fails for lack of principled judgment about when, why, and whether to act. We address this gap by proposing a conceptual model that reframes behavior as an interpretive outcome integrating Scene (observable situation), Context (user-constructed meaning), and Human Behavior Factors (determinants shaping behavioral likelihood). Grounded in multidisciplinary perspectives across the humanities, social sciences, HCI, and engineering, the model separates what is observable from what is meaningful to the user and explains how the same scene can yield different behavioral meanings and outcomes. To translate this lens into design action, we derive five agent design principles (behavioral alignment, contextual sensitivity, temporal appropriateness, motivational calibration, and agency preservation) that guide intervention depth, timing, intensity, and restraint. Together, the model and principles provide a foundation for designing agentic AI systems that act with contextual sensitivity and judgment in interactions.
tldr: This paper introduces a human-centered model integrating Scene, Context, and Human Behavior Factors to guide the design of agentic AI that acts with contextual sensitivity and judgment. It proposes design principles for intervention depth, timing, and intensity.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个人本模型，整合了场景、语境和人类行为因素，以指导具有语境敏感性和判断力的自主人工智能的设计。 它提出了干预深度、时间和强度的设计原则。
summary_zh: 代理人工智能越来越多地通过推断用户在情境数据中的情况来主动干预，但往往因缺乏关于何时、为何以及是否行动的原则性判断而失败。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一个概念模型，该模型将行为重新定义为一个解释性结果，整合了场景（可观察的情况）、语境（用户构建的意义）和人类行为因素（塑造行为可能性的决定因素）。该模型基于人文科学、社会科学、人机交互和工程学等多学科视角，将可观察的内容与对用户有意义的内容区分开来，并解释了同一场景如何产生不同的行为意义和结果。为了将这一视角转化为设计行动，我们推导出了五个代理设计原则（行为对齐、语境敏感性、时间适当性、动机校准和代理能力保护），这些原则指导干预的深度、时机、强度和克制。总之，该模型和原则为设计在交互中具有语境敏感性和判断力的代理人工智能系统奠定了基础。

title: Knob: A Physics-Inspired Gating Interface for Interpretable and Controllable Neural Dynamics
summary: Existing neural network calibration methods often treat calibration as a static, post-hoc optimization task. However, this neglects the dynamic and temporal nature of real-world inference. Moreover, existing methods do not provide an intuitive interface enabling human operators to dynamically adjust model behavior under shifting conditions. In this work, we propose Knob, a framework that connects deep learning with classical control theory by mapping neural gating dynamics to a second-order mechanical system. By establishing correspondences between physical parameters -- damping ratio ($ζ$) and natural frequency ($ω_n$) -- and neural gating, we create a tunable "safety valve". The core mechanism employs a logit-level convex fusion, functioning as an input-adaptive temperature scaling. It tends to reduce model confidence particularly when model branches produce conflicting predictions. Furthermore, by imposing second-order dynamics (Knob-ODE), we enable a \textit{dual-mode} inference: standard i.i.d. processing for static tasks, and state-preserving processing for continuous streams. Our framework allows operators to tune "stability" and "sensitivity" through familiar physical analogues. This paper presents an exploratory architectural interface; we focus on demonstrating the concept and validating its control-theoretic properties rather than claiming state-of-the-art calibration performance. Experiments on CIFAR-10-C validate the calibration mechanism and demonstrate that, in Continuous Mode, the gate responses are consistent with standard second-order control signatures (step settling and low-pass attenuation), paving the way for predictable human-in-the-loop tuning.
tldr: This paper introduces 'Knob,' a physics-inspired gating mechanism for neural networks that allows for interpretable and controllable dynamic adjustments, particularly useful in continuous data streams by mapping neural gating to a second-order mechanical system.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了 'Knob'，一种受物理学启发的神经网络门控机制，通过将神经门控映射到二阶力学系统，实现了可解释和可控的动态调整，特别适用于连续数据流。
summary_zh: 现有的神经网络校准方法通常将校准视为一种静态的、事后优化任务。然而，这忽略了真实世界推理的动态性和时间性。此外，现有方法未能提供直观的界面，使操作人员能够在不断变化的条件下动态调整模型行为。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Knob，一个通过将神经门控动态映射到二阶机械系统来连接深度学习和经典控制理论的框架。通过建立物理参数——阻尼比 ($ζ$) 和固有频率 ($ω_n$)——与神经门控之间的对应关系，我们创建了一个可调的“安全阀”。其核心机制采用 logits 级别的凸融合，充当输入自适应的温度缩放。它倾向于降低模型置信度，尤其是在模型分支产生冲突预测时。此外，通过施加二阶动力学（Knob-ODE），我们实现了\textit{双模式}推理：用于静态任务的标准 i.i.d. 处理，以及用于连续流的状态保持处理。我们的框架允许操作人员通过熟悉的物理类比来调整“稳定性”和“灵敏度”。本文提出了一个探索性的架构界面；我们专注于展示概念并验证其控制理论性质，而不是声称达到最先进的校准性能。在 CIFAR-10-C 上的实验验证了校准机制，并表明在连续模式下，门控响应与标准的二阶控制特征（阶跃稳定和低通衰减）一致，从而为可预测的人在回路调整铺平了道路。

title: ArchAgent: Agentic AI-driven Computer Architecture Discovery
summary:
Agile hardware design flows are a critically needed force multiplier to meet the exploding demand for compute. Recently, agentic generative AI systems have demonstrated significant advances in algorithm design, improving code efficiency, and enabling discovery across scientific domains.
  Bridging these worlds, we present ArchAgent, an automated computer architecture discovery system built on AlphaEvolve. We show ArchAgent's ability to automatically design/implement state-of-the-art (SoTA) cache replacement policies (architecting new mechanisms/logic, not only changing parameters), broadly within the confines of an established cache replacement policy design competition.
  In two days without human intervention, ArchAgent generated a policy achieving a 5.3% IPC speedup improvement over the prior SoTA on public multi-core Google Workload Traces. On the heavily-explored single-core SPEC06 workloads, it generated a policy in just 18 days showing a 0.9% IPC speedup improvement over the existing SoTA (a similar "winning margin" as reported by the existing SoTA). ArchAgent achieved these gains 3-5x faster than prior human-developed SoTA policies.
  Agentic flows also enable "post-silicon hyperspecialization" where agents tune runtime-configurable parameters exposed in hardware policies to further align the policies with a specific workload (mix). Exploiting this, we demonstrate a 2.4% IPC speedup improvement over prior SoTA on SPEC06 workloads.
  Finally, we outline broader implications for computer architecture research in the era of agentic AI. For example, we demonstrate the phenomenon of "simulator escapes", where the agentic AI flow discovered and exploited a loophole in a popular microarchitectural simulator - a consequence of the fact that these research tools were designed for a (now past) world where they were exclusively operated by humans acting in good-faith.
tldr: The paper introduces ArchAgent, an agentic AI system built on AlphaEvolve, which automatically discovers and implements state-of-the-art cache replacement policies, achieving significant speedups compared to human-developed policies and uncovering simulator loopholes.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为ArchAgent的智能AI系统，它构建于AlphaEvolve之上，能够自动发现并实现最先进的缓存替换策略，相较于人类开发的策略，实现了显著的加速，并揭示了模拟器的漏洞。
summary_zh:
敏捷硬件设计流程是满足激增计算需求的急需倍增器。 近来，基于代理的生成式人工智能系统在算法设计方面展示了显著进展，提高了代码效率，并促进了跨科学领域的发现。

我们架起了这两个世界的桥梁，提出了ArchAgent，一个基于AlphaEvolve构建的自动化计算机体系结构发现系统。 我们展示了ArchAgent自动设计/实现最先进 (SoTA) 缓存替换策略的能力（构建新的机制/逻辑，而不仅仅是改变参数），其广泛应用于一个已建立的缓存替换策略设计竞赛的范围内。

在两天无人为干预的情况下，ArchAgent生成了一种策略，在公开的多核谷歌工作负载追踪上实现了比之前SoTA策略高5.3%的IPC加速提升。 在经过充分探索的单核SPEC06工作负载上，它仅用18天就生成了一种策略，实现了比现有SoTA策略高0.9%的IPC加速提升（与现有SoTA策略报告的类似“胜出幅度”）。 ArchAgent获得这些收益的速度比先前人为开发的SoTA策略快3-5倍。

基于代理的流程还实现了“后硅片超专业化”，即代理调整硬件策略中暴露的运行时可配置参数，以进一步使策略与特定工作负载（组合）对齐。 利用这一点，我们展示了在SPEC06工作负载上比之前的SoTA策略高2.4%的IPC加速提升。

最后，我们概述了基于代理的人工智能时代计算机体系结构研究更广泛的意义。 例如，我们展示了“模拟器逃逸”现象，即基于代理的人工智能流程发现并利用了一个流行的微架构模拟器中的漏洞 —— 这是因为这些研究工具是为一个（现在已经过去的）世界设计的，在这个世界里，它们只由本着诚意行事的人类操作。

title: Vibe Researching as Wolf Coming: Can AI Agents with Skills Replace or Augment Social Scientists?
summary: AI agents -- systems that execute multi-step reasoning workflows with persistent state, tool access, and specialist skills -- represent a qualitative shift from prior automation technologies in social science. Unlike chatbots that respond to isolated queries, AI agents can now read files, run code, query databases, search the web, and invoke domain-specific skills to execute entire research pipelines autonomously. This paper introduces the concept of vibe researching -- the AI-era parallel to ``vibe coding'' (Karpathy, 2025) -- and uses scholar-skill, a 21-skill plugin for Claude Code covering the full research pipeline from idea to submission, as an illustrative case. I develop a cognitive task framework that classifies research activities along two dimensions -- codifiability and tacit knowledge requirement -- to identify a delegation boundary that is cognitive, not sequential: it cuts through every stage of the research pipeline, not between stages. I argue that AI agents excel at speed, coverage, and methodological scaffolding but struggle with theoretical originality and tacit field knowledge. The paper concludes with an analysis of three implications for the profession -- augmentation with fragile conditions, stratification risk, and a pedagogical crisis -- and proposes five principles for responsible vibe researching.
tldr: This paper explores the potential of AI agents to automate social science research, introducing the concept of 'vibe researching' and analyzing the division of labor between AI and human researchers, highlighting both the opportunities and risks.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了人工智能主体自动化社会科学研究的潜力，介绍了“氛围研究”的概念，并分析了人工智能与人类研究人员之间的劳动分工，突出了机遇与风险。
