summary_zh: 人工智能代理——具备持久状态、工具访问权限和专业技能，执行多步推理工作流程的系统——代表了社会科学领域相对于以往自动化技术的一种质变。与仅响应孤立查询的聊天机器人不同，人工智能代理现在可以读取文件、运行代码、查询数据库、搜索网络，并调用特定领域的技能来自主执行整个研究流程。本文介绍了“氛围研究”的概念——人工智能时代与“氛围编码”（Karpathy, 2025）相对应的概念——并以学者技能（scholar-skill）为例进行说明，这是一个包含21项技能的Claude Code插件，涵盖从想法到提交的完整研究流程。我开发了一个认知任务框架，该框架根据两个维度——可编码性和隐性知识需求——对研究活动进行分类，从而识别出一个认知而非顺序的委派边界：它贯穿研究流程的每个阶段，而不是在各个阶段之间。我认为，人工智能代理在速度、覆盖范围和方法论脚手架方面表现出色，但在理论原创性和隐性领域知识方面存在不足。本文最后分析了该技术对该行业的三个影响——带有脆弱条件的增强、分层风险和教学危机——并为负责任的氛围研究提出了五项原则。

title: DyaDiT: A Multi-Modal Diffusion Transformer for Socially Favorable Dyadic Gesture Generation
summary: Generating realistic conversational gestures are essential for achieving natural, socially engaging interactions with digital humans. However, existing methods typically map a single audio stream to a single speaker's motion, without considering social context or modeling the mutual dynamics between two people engaging in conversation. We present DyaDiT, a multi-modal diffusion transformer that generates contextually appropriate human motion from dyadic audio signals. Trained on Seamless Interaction Dataset, DyaDiT takes dyadic audio with optional social-context tokens to produce context-appropriate motion. It fuses information from both speakers to capture interaction dynamics, uses a motion dictionary to encode motion priors, and can optionally utilize the conversational partner's gestures to produce more responsive motion. We evaluate DyaDiT on standard motion generation metrics and conduct quantitative user studies, demonstrating that it not only surpasses existing methods on objective metrics but is also strongly preferred by users, highlighting its robustness and socially favorable motion generation. Code and models will be released upon acceptance.
tldr: DyaDiT, a multi-modal diffusion transformer, generates socially appropriate gestures for two-person conversations using audio and optional partner gestures, outperforming existing methods in both objective metrics and user preference.
tldr_zh: DyaDiT是一个多模态扩散Transformer，它使用音频和可选的伙伴手势为双人对话生成符合社会规范的手势，在客观指标和用户偏好方面均优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 生成逼真的会话手势对于实现与数字人之间自然、具有社交吸引力的互动至关重要。然而，现有方法通常将单个音频流映射到单个说话者的动作，而没有考虑社交情境或建模对话中两人之间的相互动态。我们提出DyaDiT，一种多模态扩散Transformer，可从二元音频信号生成情境适当的人体动作。DyaDiT在无缝交互数据集上训练，采用二元音频和可选的社交情境令牌来产生情境适当的动作。它融合来自两位说话者的信息以捕捉交互动态，使用动作词典来编码动作先验，并且可以选择利用对话伙伴的手势来产生更具响应性的动作。我们在标准动作生成指标上评估了DyaDiT，并进行了定量用户研究，结果表明它不仅在客观指标上超越了现有方法，而且也深受用户喜爱，突显了其稳健性和在社交上更有利的动作生成能力。代码和模型将在接收后发布。

title: No Labels, No Look-Ahead: Unsupervised Online Video Stabilization with Classical Priors
summary: We propose a new unsupervised framework for online video stabilization. Unlike methods based on deep learning that require paired stable and unstable datasets, our approach instantiates the classical stabilization pipeline with three stages and incorporates a multithreaded buffering mechanism. This design addresses three longstanding challenges in end-to-end learning: limited data, poor controllability, and inefficiency on hardware with constrained resources. Existing benchmarks focus mainly on handheld videos with a forward view in visible light, which restricts the applicability of stabilization to domains such as UAV nighttime remote sensing. To fill this gap, we introduce a new multimodal UAV aerial video dataset (UAV-Test). Experiments show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art online stabilizers in both quantitative metrics and visual quality, while achieving performance comparable to offline methods.
tldr: This paper introduces an unsupervised online video stabilization framework using classical priors and a new UAV aerial video dataset, addressing limitations of deep learning-based methods and expanding applicability to domains like UAV nighttime remote sensing.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于经典先验的无监督在线视频稳定框架，并提出了一个新的无人机航拍视频数据集，旨在解决基于深度学习方法的局限性，并将应用扩展到无人机夜间遥感等领域。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种新的无监督在线视频稳定框架。与需要配对的稳定和不稳定数据集的深度学习方法不同，我们的方法实例化了经典稳定流程中的三个阶段，并结合了多线程缓冲机制。这种设计解决了端到端学习中长期存在的三个挑战：数据有限、可控性差以及在资源受限硬件上的低效率。现有的基准测试主要集中在可见光下的手持前向视角视频上，这限制了稳定技术在无人机夜间遥感等领域的应用。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了一个新的多模态无人机航拍视频数据集（UAV-Test）。实验表明，我们的方法在定量指标和视觉质量上均持续优于最先进的在线稳定器，同时实现了与离线方法相当的性能。

title: OpenFS: Multi-Hand-Capable Fingerspelling Recognition with Implicit Signing-Hand Detection and Frame-Wise Letter-Conditioned Synthesis
summary: Fingerspelling is a component of sign languages in which words are spelled out letter by letter using specific hand poses. Automatic fingerspelling recognition plays a crucial role in bridging the communication gap between Deaf and hearing communities, yet it remains challenging due to the signing-hand ambiguity issue, the lack of appropriate training losses, and the out-of-vocabulary (OOV) problem. Prior fingerspelling recognition methods rely on explicit signing-hand detection, which often leads to recognition failures, and on a connectionist temporal classification (CTC) loss, which exhibits the peaky behavior problem. To address these issues, we develop OpenFS, an open-source approach for fingerspelling recognition and synthesis. We propose a multi-hand-capable fingerspelling recognizer that supports both single- and multi-hand inputs and performs implicit signing-hand detection by incorporating a dual-level positional encoding and a signing-hand focus (SF) loss. The SF loss encourages cross-attention to focus on the signing hand, enabling implicit signing-hand detection during recognition. Furthermore, without relying on the CTC loss, we introduce a monotonic alignment (MA) loss that enforces the output letter sequence to follow the temporal order of the input pose sequence through cross-attention regularization. In addition, we propose a frame-wise letter-conditioned generator that synthesizes realistic fingerspelling pose sequences for OOV words. This generator enables the construction of a new synthetic benchmark, called FSNeo. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in recognition and validate the effectiveness of the proposed recognizer and generator. Codes and data are available in: https://github.com/JunukCha/OpenFS.
tldr: The paper introduces OpenFS, an open-source approach for multi-hand-capable fingerspelling recognition and synthesis, addressing challenges like signing-hand ambiguity and out-of-vocabulary words with novel techniques such as a signing-hand focus loss and a monotonic alignment loss. It establishes state-of-the-art performance and provides a new synthetic dataset, FSNeo.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了OpenFS，一种用于多手势手指拼写识别和合成的开源方法，通过例如手势手部聚焦损失（signing-hand focus loss）和单调对齐损失（monotonic alignment loss）等创新技术，解决了手势手部歧义和词汇外问题等挑战。它建立了最先进的性能，并提供了一个新的合成数据集FSNeo。
summary_zh: 手指字母拼写是手语的一个组成部分，通过特定的手势逐个字母地拼写单词。自动手指字母拼写识别在弥合聋人和健听人之间的沟通鸿沟中发挥着关键作用，但由于手势手歧义问题、缺乏合适的训练损失以及词汇外（OOV）问题，它仍然具有挑战性。先前的手指字母拼写识别方法依赖于显式的手势手检测，这通常会导致识别失败，以及依赖于连接时序分类（CTC）损失，该损失表现出峰值行为问题。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了OpenFS，一种用于手指字母拼写识别和合成的开源方法。我们提出了一种多手能力的手指字母拼写识别器，支持单手和多手输入，并通过结合双层位置编码和手势手聚焦（SF）损失来执行隐式手势手检测。SF损失鼓励跨注意力集中于手势手，从而在识别期间实现隐式手势手检测。此外，在不依赖CTC损失的情况下，我们引入了一种单调对齐（MA）损失，该损失通过跨注意力正则化强制输出字母序列遵循输入姿势序列的时间顺序。此外，我们提出了一种帧级的字母条件生成器，用于合成词汇外单词的真实手指字母拼写姿势序列。该生成器能够构建一个新的合成基准，称为FSNeo。通过全面的实验，我们证明了我们的方法在识别方面取得了最先进的性能，并验证了所提出的识别器和生成器的有效性。代码和数据可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/JunukCha/OpenFS。

title: SO3UFormer: Learning Intrinsic Spherical Features for Rotation-Robust Panoramic Segmentation
summary: Panoramic semantic segmentation models are typically trained under a strict gravity-aligned assumption. However, real-world captures often deviate from this canonical orientation due to unconstrained camera motions, such as the rotational jitter of handheld devices or the dynamic attitude shifts of aerial platforms. This discrepancy causes standard spherical Transformers to overfit global latitude cues, leading to performance collapse under 3D reorientations. To address this, we introduce SO3UFormer, a rotation-robust architecture designed to learn intrinsic spherical features that are less sensitive to the underlying coordinate frame. Our approach rests on three geometric pillars: (1) an intrinsic feature formulation that decouples the representation from the gravity vector by removing absolute latitude encoding; (2) quadrature-consistent spherical attention that accounts for non-uniform sampling densities; and (3) a gauge-aware relative positional mechanism that encodes local angular geometry using tangent-plane projected angles and discrete gauge pooling, avoiding reliance on global axes. We further use index-based spherical resampling together with a logit-level SO(3)-consistency regularizer during training. To rigorously benchmark robustness, we introduce Pose35, a dataset variant of Stanford2D3D perturbed by random rotations within $\pm 35^\circ$. Under the extreme test of arbitrary full SO(3) rotations, existing SOTAs fail catastrophically: the baseline SphereUFormer drops from 67.53 mIoU to 25.26 mIoU. In contrast, SO3UFormer demonstrates remarkable stability, achieving 72.03 mIoU on Pose35 and retaining 70.67 mIoU under full SO(3) rotations.
tldr: The paper introduces SO3UFormer, a rotation-robust panoramic semantic segmentation architecture using intrinsic spherical features and demonstrates its superior performance compared to existing methods under significant 3D rotations. They also introduce the Pose35 dataset for benchmarking.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SO3UFormer，一种旋转鲁棒的全景语义分割架构，它利用内在球形特征，并在显著的3D旋转下表现出优于现有方法的性能。他们还介绍了用于基准测试的Pose35数据集。
summary_zh: 全景语义分割模型通常在严格的重力对齐假设下进行训练。然而，由于手持设备的旋转抖动或空中平台的动态姿态变化等不受约束的相机运动，真实世界的捕获常常偏离这种标准方向。这种差异导致标准的球面Transformer过度拟合全局纬度线索，从而导致在3D重新定向下性能崩溃。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了SO3UFormer，一种旋转鲁棒的架构，旨在学习对底层坐标系不太敏感的固有球面特征。我们的方法基于三个几何支柱：（1）一种固有的特征表示，通过消除绝对纬度编码，将表示与重力向量解耦；（2）考虑到非均匀采样密度的求积一致性球面注意力；以及（3）一种量规感知的相对位置机制，该机制使用切平面投影角度和离散量规池化来编码局部角度几何，避免依赖于全局轴。我们进一步使用基于索引的球面重采样以及训练期间的logit水平SO(3)-一致性正则化器。为了严格地基准测试鲁棒性，我们引入了Pose35，一个Stanford2D3D的数据集变体，该变体受到$\pm 35^\circ$范围内随机旋转的扰动。在任意完整SO(3)旋转的极端测试下，现有的最先进方法会灾难性地失败：基线SphereUFormer从67.53 mIoU降至25.26 mIoU。相比之下，SO3UFormer表现出卓越的稳定性，在Pose35上实现了72.03 mIoU，并在完整SO(3)旋转下保持了70.67 mIoU。

title: Robust Human Trajectory Prediction via Self-Supervised Skeleton Representation Learning
summary: Human trajectory prediction plays a crucial role in applications such as autonomous navigation and video surveillance. While recent works have explored the integration of human skeleton sequences to complement trajectory information, skeleton data in real-world environments often suffer from missing joints caused by occlusions. These disturbances significantly degrade prediction accuracy, indicating the need for more robust skeleton representations. We propose a robust trajectory prediction method that incorporates a self-supervised skeleton representation model pretrained with masked autoencoding. Experimental results in occlusion-prone scenarios show that our method improves robustness to missing skeletal data without sacrificing prediction accuracy, and consistently outperforms baseline models in clean-to-moderate missingness regimes.
tldr: This paper presents a robust human trajectory prediction method that uses self-supervised learning with masked autoencoding to handle missing skeletal data due to occlusions, improving prediction accuracy in challenging scenarios.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种鲁棒的人类轨迹预测方法，该方法使用带有掩码自动编码器的自监督学习来处理因遮挡而导致的骨骼数据缺失，从而提高了在具有挑战性的场景中的预测精度。
summary_zh: 人类轨迹预测在自动导航和视频监控等应用中发挥着关键作用。虽然最近的研究已经探索了整合人体骨骼序列以补充轨迹信息，但真实环境中的骨骼数据经常受到由遮挡引起的关节缺失的影响。这些干扰显著降低了预测精度，表明需要更稳健的骨骼表示。我们提出了一种稳健的轨迹预测方法，该方法结合了一个使用掩码自编码进行预训练的自监督骨骼表示模型。在易于遮挡的场景中的实验结果表明，我们的方法提高了对缺失骨骼数据的鲁棒性，且不牺牲预测精度，并在从干净到中等缺失程度的情况下始终优于基线模型。

title: SPMamba-YOLO: An Underwater Object Detection Network Based on Multi-Scale Feature Enhancement and Global Context Modeling
summary: Underwater object detection is a critical yet challenging research problem owing to severe light attenuation, color distortion, background clutter, and the small scale of underwater targets. To address these challenges, we propose SPMamba-YOLO, a novel underwater object detection network that integrates multi-scale feature enhancement with global context modeling. Specifically, a Spatial Pyramid Pooling Enhanced Layer Aggregation Network (SPPELAN) module is introduced to strengthen multi-scale feature aggregation and expand the receptive field, while a Pyramid Split Attention (PSA) mechanism enhances feature discrimination by emphasizing informative regions and suppressing background interference. In addition, a Mamba-based state space modeling module is incorporated to efficiently capture long-range dependencies and global contextual information, thereby improving detection robustness in complex underwater environments. Extensive experiments on the URPC2022 dataset demonstrate that SPMamba-YOLO outperforms the YOLOv8n baseline by more than 4.9\% in mAP@0.5, particularly for small and densely distributed underwater objects, while maintaining a favorable balance between detection accuracy and computational cost.
tldr: The paper proposes SPMamba-YOLO, an underwater object detection network leveraging multi-scale feature enhancement and Mamba-based global context modeling, achieving improved mAP on the URPC2022 dataset compared to YOLOv8n.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了SPMamba-YOLO，一种利用多尺度特征增强和基于Mamba的全局上下文建模的水下目标检测网络。在URPC2022数据集上，该方法比YOLOv8n的mAP有所提高。
summary_zh: 水下目标检测是一项关键但具有挑战性的研究问题，其难点在于严重的光衰减、颜色失真、背景杂乱以及水下目标的小尺度。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新型的水下目标检测网络SPMamba-YOLO，该网络集成了多尺度特征增强与全局上下文建模。具体而言，引入了空间金字塔池化增强层聚合网络（SPPELAN）模块来加强多尺度特征聚合，并扩展感受野，同时，金字塔分割注意力（PSA）机制通过强调信息丰富的区域并抑制背景干扰来增强特征区分能力。此外，还集成了一个基于Mamba的状态空间建模模块，以高效地捕获长程依赖关系和全局上下文信息，从而提高在复杂水下环境中检测的鲁棒性。在URPC2022数据集上的大量实验表明，SPMamba-YOLO在mAP@0.5上比YOLOv8n基线提升了4.9%以上，尤其是在检测小型和密集分布的水下目标时，同时在检测精度和计算成本之间保持了良好的平衡。

title: QuadSync: Quadrifocal Tensor Synchronization via Tucker Decomposition
summary: In structure from motion, quadrifocal tensors capture more information than their pairwise counterparts (essential matrices), yet they have often been thought of as impractical and only of theoretical interest. In this work, we challenge such beliefs by providing a new framework to recover $n$ cameras from the corresponding collection of quadrifocal tensors. We form the block quadrifocal tensor and show that it admits a Tucker decomposition whose factor matrices are the stacked camera matrices, and which thus has a multilinear rank of (4,~4,~4,~4) independent of $n$. We develop the first synchronization algorithm for quadrifocal tensors, using Tucker decomposition, alternating direction method of multipliers, and iteratively reweighted least squares. We further establish relationships between the block quadrifocal, trifocal, and bifocal tensors, and introduce an algorithm that jointly synchronizes these three entities. Numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods on modern datasets, indicating the potential and importance of using higher-order information in synchronization.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel algorithm, QuadSync, for recovering camera poses from quadrifocal tensors using Tucker decomposition and demonstrates its effectiveness on modern datasets, suggesting the potential benefits of using higher-order information in structure from motion.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为 QuadSync 的新型算法，该算法利用 Tucker 分解从四焦点张量中恢复相机位姿，并在现代数据集上展示了其有效性，表明在运动结构中利用更高阶信息的潜在优势。
summary_zh: 在运动结构恢复中，四焦点张量比其成对对应物（本征矩阵）捕获更多的信息，然而它们通常被认为是仅仅具有理论意义而无法实际应用的。在这项工作中，我们通过提供一种新的框架来从相应的四焦点张量集合中恢复 $n$ 个相机，从而挑战这些观点。我们构建了块四焦点张量，并证明它可以进行 Tucker 分解，其因子矩阵是堆叠的相机矩阵，因此具有与 $n$ 无关的 (4,~4,~4,~4) 的多线性秩。我们开发了第一个用于四焦点张量的同步算法，该算法使用 Tucker 分解、交替方向乘子法和迭代重加权最小二乘法。我们进一步建立了块四焦点张量、三焦点张量和双焦点张量之间的关系，并介绍了一种联合同步这三种实体的方法。数值实验表明了我们的方法在现代数据集上的有效性，表明了在同步中使用高阶信息的潜力和重要性。

title: SwiftNDC: Fast Neural Depth Correction for High-Fidelity 3D Reconstruction
summary: Depth-guided 3D reconstruction has gained popularity as a fast alternative to optimization-heavy approaches, yet existing methods still suffer from scale drift, multi-view inconsistencies, and the need for substantial refinement to achieve high-fidelity geometry. Here, we propose SwiftNDC, a fast and general framework built around a Neural Depth Correction field that produces cross-view consistent depth maps. From these refined depths, we generate a dense point cloud through back-projection and robust reprojection-error filtering, obtaining a clean and uniformly distributed geometric initialization for downstream reconstruction. This reliable dense geometry substantially accelerates 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for mesh reconstruction, enabling high-quality surfaces with significantly fewer optimization iterations. For novel-view synthesis, SwiftNDC can also improve 3DGS rendering quality, highlighting the benefits of strong geometric initialization. We conduct a comprehensive study across five datasets, including two for mesh reconstruction, as well as three for novel-view synthesis. SwiftNDC consistently reduces running time for accurate mesh reconstruction and boosts rendering fidelity for view synthesis, demonstrating the effectiveness of combining neural depth refinement with robust geometric initialization for high-fidelity and efficient 3D reconstruction.
tldr: SwiftNDC introduces a fast neural depth correction framework for improved 3D reconstruction and novel view synthesis by refining depth maps and enabling efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting integration.
tldr_zh: SwiftNDC 提出了一种快速神经深度校正框架，通过优化深度图并支持高效的 3D Gaussian Splatting 集成，从而改进 3D 重建和新视角合成。
summary_zh: 深度引导的3D重建作为优化密集型方法的一种快速替代方案越来越受欢迎，但现有方法仍然存在尺度漂移、多视角不一致性以及需要大量优化才能实现高保真几何的问题。在此，我们提出 SwiftNDC，这是一个快速且通用的框架，围绕着一个神经深度校正场构建，该校正场生成跨视角一致的深度图。从这些精细化的深度图中，我们通过反投影和鲁棒的重投影误差滤波来生成一个密集的点云，从而为下游重建获得一个干净且均匀分布的几何初始化。这种可靠的密集几何大大加速了用于网格重建的 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS)，从而能够以显著减少的优化迭代次数实现高质量的表面。对于新视角合成，SwiftNDC 还可以提高 3DGS 的渲染质量，突出了强几何初始化的优势。我们对五个数据集进行了全面的研究，其中包括两个用于网格重建，以及三个用于新视角合成的数据集。SwiftNDC 始终能够减少精确网格重建的运行时间，并提高视角合成的渲染保真度，证明了将神经深度精炼与鲁棒的几何初始化相结合在实现高保真且高效的 3D 重建方面的有效性。

title: Space Syntax-guided Post-training for Residential Floor Plan Generation
summary:
Pre-trained generative models for residential floor plans are typically optimized to fit large-scale data distributions, which can under-emphasize critical architectural priors such as the configurational dominance and connectivity of domestic public spaces (e.g., living rooms and foyers). This paper proposes Space Syntax-guided Post-training (SSPT), a post-training paradigm that explicitly injects space syntax knowledge into floor plan generation via a non-differentiable oracle. The oracle converts RPLAN-style layouts into rectangle-space graphs through greedy maximal-rectangle decomposition and door-mediated adjacency construction, and then computes integration-based measurements to quantify public space dominance and functional hierarchy.
  To enable consistent evaluation and diagnosis, we further introduce SSPT-Bench (Eval-8), an out-of-distribution benchmark that post-trains models using conditions capped at $\leq 7$ rooms while evaluating on 8-room programs, together with a unified metric suite for dominance, stability, and profile alignment. SSPT is instantiated with two strategies: (i) iterative retraining via space-syntax filtering and diffusion fine-tuning, and (ii) reinforcement learning via PPO with space-syntax rewards. Experiments show that both strategies improve public-space dominance and restore clearer functional hierarchy compared to distribution-fitted baselines, while PPO achieves stronger gains with substantially higher compute efficiency and reduced variance. SSPT provides a scalable pathway for integrating architectural theory into data-driven plan generation and is compatible with other generative backbones given a post-hoc evaluation oracle.
tldr: The paper introduces Space Syntax-guided Post-training (SSPT), a method to inject architectural knowledge into pre-trained floor plan generation models using a non-differentiable oracle. It also introduces SSPT-Bench for consistent evaluation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了空间句法引导的后训练（SSPT），这是一种利用不可微的预言机将建筑知识注入预训练的楼层平面图生成模型的方法。它还引入了SSPT-Bench用于一致的评估。
summary_zh:
住宅平面图的预训练生成模型通常被优化以拟合大规模的数据分布，这可能会弱化关键的建筑先验，例如住宅公共空间（例如客厅和门厅）的配置优势和连通性。本文提出了一种空间句法引导的后训练（SSPT）方法，这是一种通过不可微的预言机将空间句法知识显式注入平面图生成的后训练范式。该预言机通过贪婪的最大矩形分解和门介导的邻接关系构建，将RPLAN风格的布局转换为矩形空间图，然后计算基于整合度的度量来量化公共空间的优势和功能层级。

为了实现一致的评估和诊断，我们进一步引入了SSPT-Bench (Eval-8)，这是一个超出分布的基准，它使用房间数量上限为$\leq 7$的约束条件对模型进行后训练，同时评估8个房间的方案，并提供一套统一的度量指标来衡量优势、稳定性和轮廓对齐。SSPT通过两种策略实现：（i）通过空间句法过滤和扩散微调进行迭代重训练，以及（ii）通过具有空间句法奖励的PPO进行强化学习。实验表明，与分布拟合的基线模型相比，这两种策略都提高了公共空间的优势并恢复了更清晰的功能层级，而PPO以更高的计算效率和更小的方差实现了更强的增益。SSPT为将建筑理论整合到数据驱动的方案生成中提供了一种可扩展的途径，并且在给定事后评估预言机的情况下，与其他的生成模型骨干网络兼容。

title: Neu-PiG: Neural Preconditioned Grids for Fast Dynamic Surface Reconstruction on Long Sequences
summary: Temporally consistent surface reconstruction of dynamic 3D objects from unstructured point cloud data remains challenging, especially for very long sequences. Existing methods either optimize deformations incrementally, risking drift and requiring long runtimes, or rely on complex learned models that demand category-specific training. We present Neu-PiG, a fast deformation optimization method based on a novel preconditioned latent-grid encoding that distributes spatial features parameterized on the position and normal direction of a keyframe surface. Our method encodes entire deformations across all time steps at various spatial scales into a multi-resolution latent grid, parameterized by the position and normal direction of a reference surface from a single keyframe. This latent representation is then augmented for time modulation and decoded into per-frame 6-DoF deformations via a lightweight multilayer perceptron (MLP). To achieve high-fidelity, drift-free surface reconstructions in seconds, we employ Sobolev preconditioning during gradient-based training of the latent space, completely avoiding the need for any explicit correspondences or further priors. Experiments across diverse human and animal datasets demonstrate that Neu-PiG outperforms state-the-art approaches, offering both superior accuracy and scalability to long sequences while running at least 60x faster than existing training-free methods and achieving inference speeds on the same order as heavy pretrained models.
tldr: Neu-PiG is a novel method for fast and accurate dynamic surface reconstruction from long point cloud sequences using a preconditioned latent grid encoding, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches in speed and accuracy without requiring explicit correspondences or priors.
tldr_zh: Neu-PiG 是一种新颖的方法，用于从长点云序列中快速准确地进行动态表面重建，它使用预处理的潜在网格编码，在速度和准确性方面优于最先进的方法，并且不需要显式对应关系或先验知识。
summary_zh: 从非结构化点云数据中对动态3D对象进行时间一致的表面重建仍然具有挑战性，特别是对于非常长的序列而言。现有方法要么以增量方式优化形变，存在漂移风险并需要较长的运行时间，要么依赖于复杂的学习模型，需要针对特定类别的训练。我们提出 Neu-PiG，一种基于新型预条件潜在网格编码的快速形变优化方法，该编码将空间特征分布于关键帧表面的位置和法线方向上。我们的方法将所有时间步长的整体形变以不同空间尺度编码到一个多分辨率潜在网格中，该网格由来自单个关键帧的参考表面的位置和法线方向参数化。然后，通过轻量级多层感知机 (MLP) 对该潜在表示进行时间调制并解码为逐帧的 6-DoF 形变。为了在几秒钟内实现高保真、无漂移的表面重建，我们在潜在空间的基于梯度的训练过程中采用 Sobolev 预条件，完全避免了对任何显式对应关系或其他先验信息的需要。在多样化的人体和动物数据集上的实验表明，Neu-PiG 优于最先进的方法，在提供卓越准确性的同时，对长序列具有更强的可扩展性，并且运行速度比现有无训练方法快至少 60 倍，同时实现了与大型预训练模型相同量级的推理速度。

title: HyperKKL: Enabling Non-Autonomous State Estimation through Dynamic Weight Conditioning
summary: This paper proposes HyperKKL, a novel learning approach for designing Kazantzis-Kravaris/Luenberger (KKL) observers for non-autonomous nonlinear systems. While KKL observers offer a rigorous theoretical framework by immersing nonlinear dynamics into a stable linear latent space, its practical realization relies on solving Partial Differential Equations (PDE) that are analytically intractable. Current existing learning-based approximations of the KKL observer are mostly designed for autonomous systems, failing to generalize to driven dynamics without expensive retraining or online gradient updates. HyperKKL addresses this by employing a hypernetwork architecture that encodes the exogenous input signal to instantaneously generate the parameters of the KKL observer, effectively learning a family of immersion maps parameterized by the external drive. We rigorously evaluate this approach against a curriculum learning strategy that attempts to generalize from autonomous regimes via training heuristics alone. The novel approach is illustrated on four numerical simulations in benchmark examples including the Duffing, Van der Pol, Lorenz, and Rössler systems.
tldr: The paper introduces HyperKKL, a hypernetwork-based approach for learning KKL observers that can handle non-autonomous nonlinear systems, outperforming curriculum learning in benchmark simulations. This tackles the challenge of generalizing learned observers to systems with external driving forces.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了HyperKKL，一种基于超网络的KKL观测器学习方法，可以处理非自治非线性系统，并在基准模拟中优于课程学习。这解决了将学习到的观测器推广到具有外部驱动力的系统中的挑战。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新的学习方法HyperKKL，用于设计非自治非线性系统的Kazantzis-Kravaris/Luenberger (KKL) 观测器。虽然KKL观测器通过将非线性动力学嵌入到稳定的线性隐空间中提供了一个严格的理论框架，但其实际实现依赖于求解解析上难以处理的偏微分方程 (PDE)。目前现有的基于学习的KKL观测器近似方法大多是为自治系统设计的，无法推广到受驱动的动力学，并且需要昂贵的重新训练或在线梯度更新。HyperKKL通过采用超网络架构来解决这个问题，该架构编码外生输入信号以即时生成KKL观测器的参数，从而有效地学习由外部驱动参数化的一系列浸入映射。我们严格评估了该方法，并将其与一种课程学习策略进行了比较，后者试图仅通过训练启发式方法从自治状态推广。在包括Duffing、Van der Pol、Lorenz和Rössler系统在内的基准实例的四个数值模拟中，说明了这种新方法。

title: Performance and Experimental Analysis of Strain-based Models for Continuum Robots
summary: Although strain-based models have been widely adopted in robotics, no comparison beyond the uniform bending test is commonly recognized to assess their performance. In addition, the increasing effort in prototyping continuum robots highlights the need to assess the applicability of these models and the necessity of comprehensive performance evaluation. To address this gap, this work investigates the shape reconstruction abilities of a third-order strain interpolation method, examining its ability to capture both individual and combined deformation effects. These results are compared and discussed against the Geometric-Variable Strain approach. Subsequently, simulation results are experimentally verified by reshaping a slender rod while recording the resulting configurations using cameras. The rod configuration is imposed using a manipulator displacing one of its tips and extracted through reflective markers, without the aid of any other external sensor -- i.e. strain gauges or wrench sensors placed along the rod. The experiments demonstrate good agreement between the model predictions and observed shapes, with average error of 0.58% of the rod length and average computational time of 0.32s per configuration, outperforming existing models.
tldr: This paper compares strain-based models for continuum robot shape reconstruction, demonstrating good agreement between model predictions and experimental results using a slender rod setup and visual tracking, outperforming existing models.
tldr_zh: 该论文比较了连续体机器人形状重建的基于应变的模型，通过细长杆装置和视觉跟踪，展示了模型预测与实验结果之间的良好一致性，且优于现有模型。
summary_zh: 虽然基于应变的模型已在机器人领域得到广泛应用，但除了均匀弯曲测试之外，尚无公认的比对方法来评估其性能。此外，连续体机器人原型设计的努力日益增加，凸显了评估这些模型的适用性和进行全面性能评估的必要性。为了弥补这一空白，本研究考察了一种三阶应变插值方法的形状重建能力，检验其捕获独立和组合变形效应的能力。并将这些结果与几何-可变应变方法进行比较和讨论。随后，通过重塑一根细长杆并在使用相机记录结果配置的同时，对仿真结果进行实验验证。杆的配置是通过一个机械臂位移其一个末端来施加的，并通过反光标记提取，无需任何其他外部传感器——即沿杆放置的应变片或力/力矩传感器。实验表明，模型预测和观察到的形状之间具有良好的一致性，误差平均值为杆长的0.58%，每次配置的平均计算时间为0.32秒，优于现有模型。

title: Robust Helicopter Ship Deck Landing With Guaranteed Timing Using Shrinking-Horizon Model Predictive Control
summary: We present a runtime efficient algorithm for autonomous helicopter landings on moving ship decks based on Shrinking-Horizon Model Predictive Control (SHMPC). First, a suitable planning model capturing the relevant aspects of the full nonlinear helicopter dynamics is derived. Next, we use the SHMPC together with a touchdown controller stage to ensure a pre-specified maneuver time and an associated landing time window despite the presence of disturbances. A high disturbance rejection performance is achieved by designing an ancillary controller with disturbance feedback. Thus, given a target position and time, a safe landing with suitable terminal conditions is be guaranteed if the initial optimization problem is feasible. The efficacy of our approach is shown in simulation where all maneuvers achieve a high landing precision in strong winds while satisfying timing and operational constraints with maximum computation times in the millisecond range.
tldr: This paper presents a shrinking-horizon model predictive control (SHMPC) algorithm for autonomous helicopter landings on moving ship decks, guaranteeing landing time and disturbance rejection, demonstrated in simulation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于收缩时域模型预测控制 (SHMPC) 的自主直升机在移动船甲板上着陆的算法，保证了着陆时间和抗干扰能力，并通过仿真进行了演示。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种基于收缩时域模型预测控制（SHMPC）的自主直升机在移动船甲板上降落的运行时高效算法。首先，推导出一个合适的规划模型，捕捉完整非线性直升机动力学的相关方面。然后，我们使用SHMPC以及着陆控制器阶段来确保预先指定的机动时间和相关的着陆时间窗口，即使存在扰动。通过设计一个具有扰动反馈的辅助控制器，实现了高扰动抑制性能。因此，给定目标位置和时间，如果初始优化问题可行，则可以保证安全着陆并满足合适的终端条件。仿真结果表明，我们的方法有效，所有机动都在强风中实现了高着陆精度，同时满足了时间约束和运行约束，最大计算时间在毫秒级别。

title: Designing Robots for Families: In-Situ Prototyping for Contextual Reminders on Family Routines
summary: Robots are increasingly entering the daily lives of families, yet their successful integration into domestic life remains a challenge. We explore family routines as a critical entry point for understanding how robots might find a sustainable role in everyday family settings. Together with each of the ten families, we co-designed robot interactions and behaviors, and a plan for the robot to support their chosen routines, accounting for contextual factors such as timing, participants, locations, and the activities in the environment. We then designed, prototyped, and deployed a mobile social robot as a four-day, in-home user study. Families welcomed the robot's reminders, with parents especially appreciating the offloading of some reminding tasks. At the same time, interviews revealed tensions around timing, authority, and family dynamics, highlighting the complexity of integrating robots into households beyond the immediate task of reminders. Based on these insights, we offer design implications for robot-facilitated contextual reminders and discuss broader considerations for designing robots for family settings.
tldr: This paper explores the integration of social robots into family routines through in-situ prototyping, focusing on contextual reminders and uncovering complexities related to timing, authority, and family dynamics.
tldr_zh: 本文通过现场原型设计，探索了社交机器人融入家庭日常活动的方式，重点关注上下文提醒，并揭示了与时间安排、权威和家庭动态相关的复杂性。
summary_zh: 机器人正日益走进家庭的日常生活，然而，如何成功地将其融入家庭生活仍然是一个挑战。我们探索家庭日常活动作为关键切入点，以理解机器人如何在日常家庭环境中找到可持续的角色。我们与十个家庭中的每一个共同设计了机器人互动和行为，以及机器人支持他们选定日常活动的计划，考虑了时间、参与者、地点以及环境中的活动等情境因素。然后，我们设计、原型设计并部署了一个移动社交机器人，作为为期四天的家庭用户研究。家庭欢迎机器人的提醒功能，尤其是父母非常欣赏卸载了一些提醒任务。与此同时，访谈揭示了围绕时间、权威和家庭动态的紧张关系，突显了将机器人融入家庭的复杂性，而不只是即时提醒任务。基于这些见解，我们为机器人辅助的情境提醒提出了设计启示，并讨论了为家庭环境设计机器人的更广泛考虑因素。

title: Relational Appliances: A Robot in the Refrigerator for Home-Based Health Promotion
summary: Kitchen appliances are frequently used domestic artifacts situated at the point of everyday dietary decision making, making them a promising but underexplored site for health promotion. We explore the concept of relational appliances: everyday household devices designed as embodied social actors that engage users through ongoing, personalized interaction. We focus on the refrigerator, whose unique affordances, including a fixed, sensor-rich environment, private interaction space, and close coupling to food items, support contextualized, conversational engagement during snack choices. We present an initial exploration of this concept through a pilot study deploying an anthropomorphic robotic head inside a household refrigerator. In a home-lab apartment, participants repeatedly retrieved snacks during simulated TV "commercial breaks" while interacting with a human-sized robotic head. Participants were randomized to either a health-promotion condition, in which the robot made healthy snack recommendations, or a social-chat control condition. Outcomes included compliance with recommendations, nutritional quality of selected snacks, and psychosocial measures related to acceptance of the robot. Results suggest that participants found the robot persuasive, socially engaging, and increasingly natural over time, often describing it as helpful, aware, and companionable. Most participants reported greater awareness of their snack decisions and expressed interest in having such a robot in their own home. We discuss implications for designing relational appliances that leverage anthropomorphism, trust, and long-term human-technology relationships for home-based health promotion.
tldr: This paper explores the use of a robotic head inside a refrigerator, designed as a 'relational appliance,' to promote healthier snack choices. A pilot study showed promising results regarding user engagement and behavior modification.
tldr_zh: 本文探索了一种冰箱内的机器人头部，将其设计为“关系型家电”，以促进更健康的零食选择。一项初步研究显示，在用户互动和行为改变方面取得了有希望的结果。
summary_zh: 厨房电器是日常饮食决策的关键环节中常用的家用器具，使其成为健康促进领域中一个很有前景但尚未充分探索的场所。本文探讨了关系型电器的概念：即被设计为具体化的社会行动者，通过持续的、个性化的互动来吸引用户的日常家用设备。我们聚焦于冰箱，其独特的特性，包括固定的、传感器丰富的环境、私密的互动空间以及与食品的紧密耦合，支持在零食选择期间进行情境化的对话式互动。本文通过在一户家庭的冰箱内部署一个拟人化的机器人头部，初步探索了这一概念。在一个家庭实验室公寓中，参与者在模拟电视“广告休息”期间反复拿取零食，同时与一个人体大小的机器人头部进行互动。参与者被随机分配到健康促进组，机器人提出健康零食建议，或社交闲聊对照组。结果包括对建议的依从性、所选零食的营养质量以及与机器人接受度相关的社会心理测量指标。结果表明，参与者认为该机器人具有说服力、具有社交吸引力，并且随着时间的推移越来越自然，经常将其描述为有帮助、有意识和友善的。大多数参与者表示更加意识到他们的零食决策，并表示有兴趣在家中使用这样的机器人。我们讨论了设计关系型电器的意义，这些电器利用拟人化、信任和长期的人机关系来实现基于家庭的健康促进。

title: ColoDiff: Integrating Dynamic Consistency With Content Awareness for Colonoscopy Video Generation
summary: Colonoscopy video generation delivers dynamic, information-rich data critical for diagnosing intestinal diseases, particularly in data-scarce scenarios. High-quality video generation demands temporal consistency and precise control over clinical attributes, but faces challenges from irregular intestinal structures, diverse disease representations, and various imaging modalities. To this end, we propose ColoDiff, a diffusion-based framework that generates dynamic-consistent and content-aware colonoscopy videos, aiming to alleviate data shortage and assist clinical analysis. At the inter-frame level, our TimeStream module decouples temporal dependency from video sequences through a cross-frame tokenization mechanism, enabling intricate dynamic modeling despite irregular intestinal structures. At the intra-frame level, our Content-Aware module incorporates noise-injected embeddings and learnable prototypes to realize precise control over clinical attributes, breaking through the coarse guidance of diffusion models. Additionally, ColoDiff employs a non-Markovian sampling strategy that cuts steps by over 90% for real-time generation. ColoDiff is evaluated across three public datasets and one hospital database, based on both generation metrics and downstream tasks including disease diagnosis, modality discrimination, bowel preparation scoring, and lesion segmentation. Extensive experiments show ColoDiff generates videos with smooth transitions and rich dynamics. ColoDiff presents an effort in controllable colonoscopy video generation, revealing the potential of synthetic videos in complementing authentic representation and mitigating data scarcity in clinical settings.
tldr: ColoDiff is a diffusion-based framework for generating dynamic-consistent and content-aware colonoscopy videos, addressing data scarcity and assisting clinical analysis by incorporating temporal and content-aware modules with a fast sampling strategy, validated on multiple datasets and downstream tasks.
tldr_zh: ColoDiff是一个基于扩散模型的框架，用于生成动态一致且内容感知的结肠镜视频，通过结合时间和内容感知模块以及快速采样策略，解决数据稀缺问题并辅助临床分析，已在多个数据集和下游任务中验证。
summary_zh: 结肠镜视频生成提供了动态的、信息丰富的数据，这些数据对于诊断肠道疾病至关重要，尤其是在数据稀缺的情况下。 高质量的视频生成需要时间一致性和对临床属性的精确控制，但面临着来自不规则肠道结构、多样化疾病表现和各种成像方式的挑战。 为此，我们提出 ColoDiff，一种基于扩散的模型框架，旨在生成动态一致且内容感知的结肠镜视频，以缓解数据短缺并辅助临床分析。 在帧间层面，我们的 TimeStream 模块通过跨帧令牌化机制将时间依赖性从视频序列中解耦，从而能够在不规则肠道结构下实现复杂动态建模。 在帧内层面，我们的 Content-Aware 模块结合了噪声注入的嵌入和可学习的原型，以实现对临床属性的精确控制，突破了扩散模型粗略的指导。 此外，ColoDiff 采用了一种非马尔可夫采样策略，该策略将步数减少 90% 以上，以实现实时生成。 ColoDiff 基于生成指标和下游任务（包括疾病诊断、模态判别、肠道准备评分和病灶分割）在三个公共数据集和一个医院数据库中进行了评估。 大量实验表明，ColoDiff 生成的视频具有平滑的过渡和丰富的动态效果。 ColoDiff 代表着在可控结肠镜视频生成方面的一项努力，揭示了合成视频在补充真实表示和缓解临床环境中数据稀缺方面的潜力。

title: Phys-3D: Physics-Constrained Real-Time Crowd Tracking and Counting on Railway Platforms
summary: Accurate, real-time crowd counting on railway platforms is essential for safety and capacity management. We propose to use a single camera mounted in a train, scanning the platform while arriving. While hardware constraints are simple, counting remains challenging due to dense occlusions, camera motion, and perspective distortions during train arrivals. Most existing tracking-by-detection approaches assume static cameras or ignore physical consistency in motion modeling, leading to unreliable counting under dynamic conditions. We propose a physics-constrained tracking framework that unifies detection, appearance, and 3D motion reasoning in a real-time pipeline. Our approach integrates a transfer-learned YOLOv11m detector with EfficientNet-B0 appearance encoding within DeepSORT, while introducing a physics-constrained Kalman model (Phys-3D) that enforces physically plausible 3D motion dynamics through pinhole geometry. To address counting brittleness under occlusions, we implement a virtual counting band with persistence. On our platform benchmark, MOT-RailwayPlatformCrowdHead Dataset(MOT-RPCH), our method reduces counting error to 2.97%, demonstrating robust performance despite motion and occlusions. Our results show that incorporating first-principles geometry and motion priors enables reliable crowd counting in safety-critical transportation scenarios, facilitating effective train scheduling and platform safety management.
tldr: The paper presents Phys-3D, a physics-constrained tracking framework for real-time crowd counting on railway platforms using a single moving camera, achieving high accuracy by incorporating 3D motion reasoning and handling occlusions.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 Phys-3D，一个物理约束的跟踪框架，用于在使用单个移动摄像头的铁路站台上进行实时人群计数，通过结合 3D 运动推理和处理遮挡来实现高精度。
summary_zh: 在铁路站台上进行准确、实时的客流计数对于安全和容量管理至关重要。我们提出使用安装在列车上的单个摄像头，在列车进站时扫描站台。虽然硬件约束简单，但由于密集的遮挡、摄像头运动以及列车到达期间的透视畸变，计数仍然具有挑战性。大多数现有的基于检测的跟踪方法都假设静态摄像头或忽略运动建模中的物理一致性，导致在动态条件下计数不可靠。我们提出了一个物理约束的跟踪框架，它将检测、外观和 3D 运动推理统一在一个实时流水线中。我们的方法整合了一个通过迁移学习得到的 YOLOv11m 检测器，并将 EfficientNet-B0 外观编码集成到 DeepSORT 中，同时引入了一个通过针孔几何强制执行物理上合理的 3D 运动动力学的物理约束卡尔曼模型 (Phys-3D)。为了解决遮挡下的计数脆弱性，我们实现了一个具有持久性的虚拟计数带。在我们的站台基准测试中，MOT-RailwayPlatformCrowdHead Dataset (MOT-RPCH) 上，我们的方法将计数误差降低到 2.97%，展示了在运动和遮挡下的鲁棒性能。我们的结果表明，结合第一性原理几何和运动先验能够实现安全关键型交通场景中可靠的客流计数，从而促进有效的列车调度和站台安全管理。

title: D-FINE-seg: Object Detection and Instance Segmentation Framework with multi-backend deployment
summary: Transformer-based real-time object detectors achieve strong accuracy-latency trade-offs, and D-FINE is among the top-performing recent architectures. However, real-time instance segmentation with transformers is still less common. We present D-FINE-seg, an instance segmentation extension of D-FINE that adds: a lightweight mask head, segmentation-aware training, including box cropped BCE and dice mask losses, auxiliary and denoising mask supervision, and adapted Hungarian matching cost. On the TACO dataset, D-FINE-seg improves F1-score over Ultralytics YOLO26 under a unified TensorRT FP16 end-to-end benchmarking protocol, while maintaining competitive latency. Second contribution is an end-to-end pipeline for training, exporting, and optimized inference across ONNX, TensorRT, OpenVINO for both object detection and instance segmentation tasks. This framework is released as open-source under the Apache-2.0 license. GitHub repository - https://github.com/ArgoHA/D-FINE-seg.
tldr: The paper introduces D-FINE-seg, an instance segmentation extension of the D-FINE object detector, achieving improved F1-score compared to YOLO26 on the TACO dataset with competitive latency, and provides an end-to-end deployment pipeline and releases the code.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 D-FINE-seg，它是 D-FINE 目标检测器的一个实例分割扩展，在 TACO 数据集上实现了优于 YOLO26 的 F1 分数，并具有竞争性的延迟。它还提供了一个端到端的部署管道，并开源了代码。
summary_zh: 基于Transformer的实时目标检测器在精度和延迟之间取得了很好的平衡，D-FINE是近期性能最佳的架构之一。然而，使用Transformer进行实时实例分割仍然不太常见。我们提出了D-FINE-seg，一种D-FINE的实例分割扩展，添加了：一个轻量级的掩码头、分割感知训练，包括裁剪框BCE和Dice掩码损失、辅助和去噪掩码监督，以及调整后的匈牙利匹配代价。在TACO数据集上，在统一的TensorRT FP16端到端基准测试协议下，D-FINE-seg的F1分数优于Ultralytics YOLO26，同时保持了具有竞争力的延迟。第二个贡献是一个端到端的流程，用于跨ONNX、TensorRT、OpenVINO对目标检测和实例分割任务进行训练、导出和优化推理。该框架以Apache-2.0许可开源发布。GitHub仓库 - https://github.com/ArgoHA/D-FINE-seg。

title: OSDaR-AR: Enhancing Railway Perception Datasets via Multi-modal Augmented Reality
summary: Although deep learning has significantly advanced the perception capabilities of intelligent transportation systems, railway applications continue to suffer from a scarcity of high-quality, annotated data for safety-critical tasks like obstacle detection. While photorealistic simulators offer a solution, they often struggle with the ``sim-to-real" gap; conversely, simple image-masking techniques lack the spatio-temporal coherence required to obtain augmented single- and multi-frame scenes with the correct appearance and dimensions. This paper introduces a multi-modal augmented reality framework designed to bridge this gap by integrating photorealistic virtual objects into real-world railway sequences from the OSDaR23 dataset. Utilizing Unreal Engine 5 features, our pipeline leverages LiDAR point-clouds and INS/GNSS data to ensure accurate object placement and temporal stability across RGB frames. This paper also proposes a segmentation-based refinement strategy for INS/GNSS data to significantly improve the realism of the augmented sequences, as confirmed by the comparative study presented in the paper. Carefully designed augmented sequences are collected to produce OSDaR-AR, a public dataset designed to support the development of next-generation railway perception systems. The dataset is available at the following page: https://syndra.retis.santannapisa.it/osdarar.html
tldr: The paper introduces OSDaR-AR, a multi-modal augmented reality framework and dataset designed to enhance railway perception by integrating photorealistic virtual objects into real-world railway sequences, addressing the sim-to-real gap.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 OSDaR-AR，一个多模态增强现实框架和数据集，旨在通过将逼真的虚拟对象集成到真实世界的铁路序列中来增强铁路感知，从而解决了 sim-to-real 的差距。
summary_zh: 尽管深度学习显著提升了智能交通系统的感知能力，但铁路应用仍然面临着用于障碍物检测等安全关键任务的高质量、标注数据匮乏的问题。逼真的仿真器提供了一种解决方案，但它们往往难以克服“仿真到真实”的差距；相反，简单的图像掩蔽技术缺乏获得具有正确外观和尺寸的增强单帧和多帧场景所需的时空连贯性。本文介绍了一种多模态增强现实框架，旨在通过将逼真的虚拟对象集成到来自OSDaR23数据集的真实铁路序列中来弥合这一差距。利用Unreal Engine 5的特性，我们的流程利用LiDAR点云和INS/GNSS数据，以确保物体在RGB帧中的准确定位和时间稳定性。本文还提出了一种基于分割的INS/GNSS数据精炼策略，以显著提高增强序列的真实感，这已通过本文提出的比较研究得到证实。 我们精心设计并收集了增强序列，从而生成了OSDaR-AR，这是一个旨在支持下一代铁路感知系统开发的公共数据集。该数据集可在以下页面获得：https://syndra.retis.santannapisa.it/osdarar.html

title: UFO-DETR: Frequency-Guided End-to-End Detector for UAV Tiny Objects
summary: Small target detection in UAV imagery faces significant challenges such as scale variations, dense distribution, and the dominance of small targets. Existing algorithms rely on manually designed components, and general-purpose detectors are not optimized for UAV images, making it difficult to balance accuracy and complexity. To address these challenges, this paper proposes an end-to-end object detection framework, UFO-DETR, which integrates an LSKNet-based backbone network to optimize the receptive field and reduce the number of parameters. By combining the DAttention and AIFI modules, the model flexibly models multi-scale spatial relationships, improving multi-scale target detection performance. Additionally, the DynFreq-C3 module is proposed to enhance small target detection capability through cross-space frequency feature enhancement. Experimental results show that, compared to RT-DETR-L, the proposed method offers significant advantages in both detection performance and computational efficiency, providing an efficient solution for UAV edge computing.
tldr: The paper introduces UFO-DETR, an end-to-end object detection framework designed to improve the detection of tiny objects in UAV imagery by optimizing receptive fields, modeling multi-scale spatial relationships, and enhancing small target features frequency representation.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了UFO-DETR，一个端到端的物体检测框架，旨在通过优化感受野、建模多尺度空间关系和增强小目标特征的频率表示来提高无人机图像中小目标的检测。
summary_zh: 无人机影像中小目标检测面临着尺度变化、密集分布以及小目标主导等重大挑战。现有算法依赖于手动设计的组件，而通用检测器未针对无人机影像进行优化，难以平衡精度和复杂性。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种端到端的目标检测框架UFO-DETR，该框架集成了一个基于LSKNet的主干网络，以优化感受野并减少参数数量。通过结合DAttention和AIFI模块，该模型可以灵活地建模多尺度空间关系，从而提高多尺度目标检测性能。此外，还提出了DynFreq-C3模块，通过跨空间频率特征增强来提升小目标检测能力。实验结果表明，与RT-DETR-L相比，所提出的方法在检测性能和计算效率方面都具有显著优势，为无人机边缘计算提供了一种高效的解决方案。

title: TopoEdit: Fast Post-Optimization Editing of Topology Optimized Structures
summary: Despite topology optimization producing high-performance structures, late-stage localized revisions remain brittle: direct density-space edits (e.g., warping pixels, inserting holes, swapping infill) can sever load paths and sharply degrade compliance, while re-running optimization is slow and may drift toward a qualitatively different design. We present TopoEdit, a fast post-optimization editor that demonstrates how structured latent embeddings from a pre-trained topology foundation model (OAT) can be repurposed as an interface for physics-aware engineering edits. Given an optimized topology, TopoEdit encodes it into OAT's spatial latent, applies partial noising to preserve instance identity while increasing editability, and injects user intent through an edit-then-denoise diffusion pipeline. We instantiate three edit operators: drag-based topology warping with boundary-condition-consistent conditioning updates, shell-infill lattice replacement using a lattice-anchored reference latent with updated volume-fraction conditioning, and late-stage no-design region enforcement via masked latent overwrite followed by diffusion-based recovery. A consistency-preserving guided DDIM procedure localizes changes while allowing global structural adaptation; multiple candidates can be sampled and selected using a compliance-aware criterion, with optional short SIMP refinement for warps. Across diverse case studies and large edit sweeps, TopoEdit produces intention-aligned modifications that better preserve mechanical performance and avoid catastrophic failure modes compared to direct density-space edits, while generating edited candidates in sub-second diffusion time per sample.
tldr: TopoEdit introduces a fast post-optimization editing method for topology-optimized structures using latent embeddings and diffusion models, enabling physics-aware engineering edits that outperform direct density-space edits. It enhances design workflows by allowing users to make modifications more quickly and reliably.
tldr_zh: TopoEdit引入了一种快速的拓扑优化结构后优化编辑方法，利用潜在嵌入和扩散模型，实现物理感知工程编辑，优于直接密度空间编辑。它通过允许用户更快、更可靠地进行修改来增强设计工作流程。
summary_zh: 虽然拓扑优化能够产生高性能结构，但后期的局部修改仍然很脆弱：直接在密度空间进行编辑（如扭曲像素、插入孔洞、交换填充）可能会切断载荷路径并显著降低顺性，而重新运行优化速度慢且可能漂移到定性上不同的设计。我们提出了TopoEdit，一种快速的优化后编辑器，展示了如何将预训练拓扑基础模型（OAT）的结构化潜在嵌入重新用作物理感知工程编辑的界面。给定一个优化后的拓扑，TopoEdit将其编码到OAT的空间潜在空间中，应用部分噪声以保留实例身份，同时提高可编辑性，并通过编辑-然后-去噪扩散管道注入用户意图。我们实例化了三个编辑算子：基于拖拽的拓扑扭曲，具有边界条件一致的条件更新；使用网格锚定参考潜在空间和更新的体积分数条件进行的壳-填充网格替换；以及通过掩码的潜在覆盖和随后基于扩散的恢复来强制执行后期的禁止设计区域。一种保持一致性的引导式DDIM过程可定位更改，同时允许全局结构自适应；可以使用顺性感知标准对多个候选方案进行采样和选择，并可选择对扭曲进行简短的SIMP细化。在各种案例研究和大规模编辑扫描中，与直接的密度空间编辑相比，TopoEdit产生了与意图对齐的修改，更好地保持了机械性能并避免了灾难性的失效模式，同时在亚秒级的扩散时间内生成每个样本的编辑候选方案。

title: Does the testing environment matter? Carsickness across on-road, test-track, and driving simulator conditions
summary: Carsickness has gained significant attention with the rise of automated vehicles, prompting extensive research across on-road, test-track, and driving simulator environments to understand its occurrence and develop mitigation strategies. However, the lack of carsickness standardization complicates comparisons across studies and environments. Previous works demonstrate measurement validity between two setups at most (e.g., on-road vs. driving simulator), leaving gaps in multi-environment comparisons. This study investigates the recreation of an on-road motion sickness exposure - previously replicated on a test track - using a motion-based driving simulator. Twenty-eight participants performed an eyes-off-road non-driving task while reporting motion sickness using the Misery Scale during the experiment and the Motion Sickness Assessment Questionnaire afterward. Psychological factors known to influence motion sickness were also assessed. The results present subjective and objective measurements for motion sickness across the considered environments. In this paper, acceleration measurements, objective metrics and subjective motion sickness ratings across environments are compared, highlighting key differences in sickness occurrence for simulator-based research validity. Significantly lower motion sickness scores are reported in the simulator compared to on-road and test-track conditions, due to its limited working envelope to reproduce low-frequency (<0.5 Hz) motions, which are the most provocative for motion sickness.
tldr: This paper investigates carsickness in on-road, test-track, and simulator environments, finding significantly lower motion sickness in the simulator due to its limited ability to reproduce low-frequency motions.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了在公路、测试跑道和模拟器环境中出现的晕车现象，发现模拟器中的晕车程度明显较低，原因是其再现低频运动的能力有限。
summary_zh: 汽车晕动症随着自动驾驶汽车的兴起而备受关注，这促使人们在实际道路、测试跑道和驾驶模拟器环境中进行了广泛的研究，以了解其发生机制并开发缓解策略。然而，缺乏汽车晕动症标准化使得跨研究和环境的比较变得复杂。以往的研究最多只展示了两种设置之间的测量有效性（例如，实际道路与驾驶模拟器），从而在多环境比较中留下了空白。本研究旨在利用基于动作的驾驶模拟器，重现此前已在测试跑道上复现的实际道路晕动症暴露。28 名参与者在进行脱眼非驾驶任务的同时，使用 Misery 量表在实验期间报告晕动症情况，并在实验后填写《晕动症评估问卷》。同时评估了已知会影响晕动症的心理因素。结果呈现了所考虑环境中晕动症的主观和客观测量结果。本文比较了各个环境中的加速度测量值、客观指标及主观晕动症评级，突出了基于模拟器的研究在效度方面，晕动症发生的关键差异。与实际道路和测试跑道条件相比，模拟器中报告的晕动症得分显著降低，这是由于其工作范围有限，无法重现低频（<0.5 Hz）运动，而这种低频运动最容易诱发晕动症。

title: Velocity and stroke rate reconstruction of canoe sprint team boats based on panned and zoomed video recordings
summary: Pacing strategies, defined by velocity and stroke rate profiles, are essential for peak performance in canoe sprint. While GPS is the gold standard for analysis, its limited availability necessitates automated video-based solutions. This paper presents an extended framework for reconstructing performance metrics from panned and zoomed video recordings across all sprint disciplines (K1-K4, C1-C2) and distances (200m-500m). Our method utilizes YOLOv8 for buoy and athlete detection, leveraging the known buoy grid to estimate homographies. We generalized the estimation of the boat position by means of learning a boat-specific athlete offset using a U-net based boat tip calibration. Further, we implement a robust tracking scheme using optical flow to adapt to multi-athlete boat types. Finally, we introduce methods to extract stroke rate information from either pose estimations or the athlete bounding boxes themselves. Evaluation against GPS data from elite competitions yields a velocity RRMSE of 0.020 +- 0.011 (rho = 0.956) and a stroke rate RRMSE of 0.022 +- 0.024 (rho = 0.932). The methods provide coaches with highly accurate, automated feedback without requiring on-boat sensors or manual annotation.
tldr: This paper presents a video-based method using YOLOv8, U-Net, and optical flow to accurately reconstruct velocity and stroke rate of canoe sprint teams, offering coaches automated feedback without on-boat sensors.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于视频的方法，使用YOLOv8、U-Net和光流来准确重建皮划艇冲刺团队的速度和划桨率，为教练提供自动反馈，无需船载传感器。
summary_zh: 配速策略，由速度和划桨频率的曲线定义，对于皮划艇短跑的巅峰表现至关重要。虽然GPS是分析的金标准，但其可用性有限，因此需要基于视频的自动化解决方案。本文提出了一种扩展框架，用于从横摇和变焦视频记录中重建所有短跑项目（K1-K4、C1-C2）和距离（200米-500米）的性能指标。我们的方法利用YOLOv8进行浮标和运动员检测，并利用已知的浮标网格来估计单应性矩阵。我们通过学习基于U-net的船头校准方法，估计船只的特定运动员偏移量，从而推广了船只位置的估计。此外，我们采用了一种使用光流的鲁棒跟踪方案，以适应多运动员船型。最后，我们引入了从姿势估计或运动员边界框中提取划桨频率信息的方法。针对来自精英比赛的GPS数据进行评估，得出的速度RRMSE为0.020 +- 0.011（rho = 0.956），划桨频率RRMSE为0.022 +- 0.024（rho = 0.932）。这些方法为教练提供了高度准确的自动化反馈，且无需船载传感器或手动标注。
